programme.title: Fast n Loud
programme.desc: Fast N Loud is a reality styled TV show featuring Richard Rawlings and his crew from the Dallas, Texas-based Gas Monkey Garage. For most people old rusty cars in garages or open spaces are nothing but junk, but not for these guys. For them it is a perfect chance to reconstruct such vehicles and make some money. The old run-down cars are restored flawlessly and are able to run steadily for the next 10 years for sure. Richard and his crew work really hard to make a name for themselves and have become a huge success thanks to their enormous talents.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How Do They Do It? Ever wondered how the stripes get into toothpaste or how contact lenses are made? How do goods get from one country to another and then into our supermarkets? What are car tires made from and exactly why are plasma TV screens flat? Eating, drinking, driving, flying. These all are activities that we carry out with barely a second thought. But have you ever wondered what exactly goes into your teabag and how it got there? How does an airport handle hundreds of thousands of items of luggage each day? And just how can a cars airbag inflate so quickly? Every day – often without even realizing it – we come into contact with technology, be it in the bathroom, in the car or on the golf course. We take a look at how things work, and focus on some of the most amazing examples of everyday objects including the worlds fastest elevator and the most expensive chocolate money can buy.

programme.title: Bitchin Rides
programme.desc: Bitchin Rides is a reality styled TV show hosted by Dave Kindig from the Salt Lake City, Utah-based company Kindig It Designs. Daves real passion is designing and building custom cars. We watch the process of restoring and rebuilding all types and all periods of cars. In each episode Dave and his team review a car, create a design, then the team takes it apart and rebuilds to create a one-of-a-kind gem. Things get really ugly before they get pretty. Dave has the best team of top mechanics, technicians and fabricators in the business, quality is their only focus when they create the baddest bitchin rides.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Gold Rush is a reality television series that follows the placer gold mining efforts of various family-run mining companies in boundless north of America. The series focuses on the work process in the conditions of permafrost and working relations between the participants. The show has 10 seasons altogether. In some episodes participants start the adventure and travel to Alaska to search for gold because of financial issues. They do not have any previous experience and have to learn on the job. Then there appears several gold mining teams that compete with each other. In some episodes the teams move to South America. Admire the courage and determination of the team members in their unstoppable desire to become rich.

programme.title: Gold Divers
programme.desc: Join the group of miners on their quest to find gold in the waters of Nome in Alaska. This reality show follows crews on boats equipped with different gadgets for gold mining- typically consisting of a sluicing apparatus, a means of paydirt collection (dredge) and a cold-water-diving life support system. With many aggravating circumstances such as rough seas, poor underwater visibility, personnel issues, ocean-damaging equipment failures and more, these tough and high tempered people risk their lives every day in hopes of finding gold and getting the big payout.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parkers Trail
programme.desc: Despite striking it rich mining in his home state of Alaska, "Gold Rush" star Parker Schnabel isnt satisfied. Hes always wondered if he could follow in the footsteps of his forebears and take on the legendary Klondike Gold Rush trail. Wonder no more. In honor of his family -- especially his beloved grandfather, who always inspired him to push beyond his limits -- Parker attempts to mimic a journey that killed thousands of brave souls in the late 19th century. As winter closes in, he begins the trek across the Coastal Range and works his way to the fabled goldfields of the Klondike. Hes joined by his foreman, Rick Ness; wilderness guide Karla Ann, who once worked with Parker as a rock truck driver; and cameramen James Levelle, who has known Parker for years.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Building Alaska is a reality and documentary TV series following a cast of characters who set out to construct three incredible cabins in the obscure Alaskan wilderness. There are no roads and no building supply centers around, and they have to deal with extreme weather conditions, not to mention curious animals. From the foundation to doors and windows, finishing with interior work and electrical system, everything should be done, so hours and hours of hard work are ahead of the participants.

programme.title: Scrappers
programme.desc: Trading scrap metal is like playing the stock market. From a small collection point, scrap metal goes a long way to collect and segregate before it reaches the furnace. The steel mills order batches of appropriately selected and prepared raw materials in a specified quantity and time. To trade scrap metal, you must have the ability to do business as well as luck. This program invites you to meet people who work in scrap yards all over Poland.

programme.title: American Chopper: Senior vs Junior
programme.desc: "American Chopper" is back ... sort of. After that popular motorcycle-building reality series crashed after six seasons amidst a Teutul family feud, Paul Sr. and son Paul Jr. return as competitors. Senior and his staff continue their work at Orange County Choppers, while Junior launches Paul Jr. Designs across the street from OCCs original site. Not only that, but Paulie twists the knife even more by hiring former OCC employees, including his brother Mikey, Vinnie DiMartino, Robert "Nub" Colard and Joe Puliafico. With the battle lines drawn, who will survive by designing and building the most innovative choppers?

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Gold Rush is a reality television series that follows the placer gold mining efforts of various family-run mining companies in boundless north of America. The series focuses on the work process in the conditions of permafrost and working relations between the participants. The show has 10 seasons altogether. In some episodes participants start the adventure and travel to Alaska to search for gold because of financial issues. They do not have any previous experience and have to learn on the job. Then there appears several gold mining teams that compete with each other. In some episodes the teams move to South America. Admire the courage and determination of the team members in their unstoppable desire to become rich.

programme.title: Gold Divers
programme.desc: Join the group of miners on their quest to find gold in the waters of Nome in Alaska. This reality show follows crews on boats equipped with different gadgets for gold mining- typically consisting of a sluicing apparatus, a means of paydirt collection (dredge) and a cold-water-diving life support system. With many aggravating circumstances such as rough seas, poor underwater visibility, personnel issues, ocean-damaging equipment failures and more, these tough and high tempered people risk their lives every day in hopes of finding gold and getting the big payout.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Buy, repair and restore and then resell a classic car in order to make profit- this is what Wheeler Dealers is about. The budget is limited, though you can see some exclusive and rare cars. Mike Brewer, a British dealer chooses the car carefully and hands it over to the mechanic, first Edd China, later Ant Anstead to be fixed and upgraded. The hosts are real masters of their trade, it seems they can bring life even to a piece of metal. It does not matter if you are a life-long car enthusiast or do not even have a driving license you will admire the results of hard work from the beginning to the end of the long uneasy restoring process.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Meet modern-day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard. With demanding customers, high turnover, and one of the biggest decorative salvage yards in the UK, Drew is constantly on the road, crisscrossing the country in search of derelict gems and forgotten remnants. Drew loves the thrill of the hunt and while he gets his hands dirty in the countrys architectural backwaters, his team of restorers is back at the shop giving old and rare finds a new lease on life!

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour
programme.desc: In Southern France, Mike and Elvis find a charming 2CV Fourgonette. Its got a modest engine, tired suspension and missing rear seats.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis engage in the ultimate Aussie showdown: Ford versus Holden. Can their Ford XR8 outpace the Holden GTS at the Mount Panorama circuit?

programme.title: How Its Made
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how things that surround us every day are produced? Find out about the whole process from the beginning to the end in a documentary television series How Its Made. The series demonstrates how various items like clothing and accessories, food, industrial products, cars, musical instruments and many more are manufactured. Who would have thought how exciting it would be to watch a cupcake, formula 1 race car or gummy vitamins being made?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How Do They Do It? Ever wondered how the stripes get into toothpaste or how contact lenses are made? How do goods get from one country to another and then into our supermarkets? What are car tires made from and exactly why are plasma TV screens flat? Eating, drinking, driving, flying. These all are activities that we carry out with barely a second thought. But have you ever wondered what exactly goes into your teabag and how it got there? How does an airport handle hundreds of thousands of items of luggage each day? And just how can a cars airbag inflate so quickly? Every day – often without even realizing it – we come into contact with technology, be it in the bathroom, in the car or on the golf course. We take a look at how things work, and focus on some of the most amazing examples of everyday objects including the worlds fastest elevator and the most expensive chocolate money can buy.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Meet modern-day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard. With demanding customers, high turnover, and one of the biggest decorative salvage yards in the UK, Drew is constantly on the road, crisscrossing the country in search of derelict gems and forgotten remnants. Drew loves the thrill of the hunt and while he gets his hands dirty in the countrys architectural backwaters, his team of restorers is back at the shop giving old and rare finds a new lease on life!

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: Mike Whiteside and Robert Kulp are the hosts of Salvage Dawgs show that is about saving beautiful old things from buildings planned to be torn down. They and their talented crew teach the viewers how to repurpose old stuff into something new and useful instead of throwing it away. So if you are remodeling your home think twice before you get rid of anything. Get creative, have some fun and learn tips and tricks to help you build your skills. Learn how to transform old chairs into a functional bench, how to repurpose an old paneled door into a shelf and enjoy fantastic vintage pieces from the past.

programme.title: Beach Hunters
programme.desc: Reality show revolves around homes on the sand in the most stunning beaches. The hosts are travelling to the exquisite destinations trying to help the potential buyers to find the house of their dream. Together they examine properties and choose the one according to their taste, budget and of coarse location. Take a look at some absolutely gorgeous houses on the white sand with a magnificent view of the sea, a dream of each and everyone.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.desc: The nostalgia, charm and history behind New England farmhouses are a few of the reasons Jonathan Knight loves to restore old homes. With the help of his designer, Kristina, Jonathan works to keep that history alive by breathing new life into the homes.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.desc: The 1873 historical home that Jonathan and Kristina are asked to update belonged to the grandparents of a young couple with three children. The house is filled with wonderful childhood memories from the past, but it is dark and lacks function. Jonathan turns the house into a vibrant family home that respects its historic roots, where this family of five can create their own memories.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers
programme.desc: Unique American reality series that follows a group of friends in Utah- David Heavy D Sparks, David Diesel Dave Kiley, and their crew at DieselSellerz who sell parts for diesel trucks and jeeps, repair and customize pickup trucks. They design and build some of the biggest and most amazing diesel powered vehicles you will ever see, and also do truck giveaways. Watch as they create these awesome masterpieces and enjoy all the crazy adventures they get into while doing it.

programme.title: Fast n Loud
programme.desc: Fast N Loud is a reality styled TV show featuring Richard Rawlings and his crew from the Dallas, Texas-based Gas Monkey Garage. For most people old rusty cars in garages or open spaces are nothing but junk, but not for these guys. For them it is a perfect chance to reconstruct such vehicles and make some money. The old run-down cars are restored flawlessly and are able to run steadily for the next 10 years for sure. Richard and his crew work really hard to make a name for themselves and have become a huge success thanks to their enormous talents.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: Border Control Italia
programme.desc: Follows the officers of the Security and Customs Services at the borders of Italy, which are under the constant threat from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Border Control Italia
programme.desc: Follows the officers of the Security and Customs Services at the borders of Italy, which are under the constant threat from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Shed And Buried: Classic Cars
programme.desc: Shed and Buried: Classic Cars sees Henry team-up with Fuzz Townshend once again. The duo will be doing what they do best: digging in the nations sheds, barns and outbuildings, this time to (hopefully) find a tidy profit in some vintage motors.

programme.title: Last Chance Garage
programme.desc: Specialty car restoration mistakes are much more common than youd think, and each episode of LAST CHANCE GARAGE features a car with a horrifying backstory: multiple shops, years lost, and tens of thousands of dollars in sunk costs. On the flip side of that struggle, audiences will see the customer and learn about their unique - and often deeply personal - connection to their car.

programme.title: Kidnap and Rescue
programme.desc: Kidnap and Rescue is a provocative new series about kidnapping and the rescuers with the courage to go where no one else can – risking violent reprisal to reclaim innocent victims, inside our borders and beyond. Whether its a high-profile executive being held for ransom, a child sold overseas or a DEA agent taken by a vengeful cartel, the hope of every victim lies in the hands of the few with the training and dedication to bring them home. Kidnap and Rescue takes Discovery Channel viewers deep into a shadow world of astonishing cruelty and terrifying extremes.

programme.title: Water: H2O Stories
programme.desc: Water: H2O Stories is a 3x52 series revisiting the story of water on planet Earth and its disrupted course over time which has led to the 21st century biggest challenge.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see, how we can live in space and what science tells us about the past and the future as we journey inside out of space.

programme.title: Natures Force
programme.desc: Journey inside Dust Storms to see how they are formed and the hazards and effects they cause. A glimpse into the science of Clouds and how they fit into the weather cycle of the planet. The power of Lightening is more than visual, it is noise, electricity and it even helps plants to grow. Did you know that Rain droplets have different shapes and temperatures, its maybe more interesting than you think?

programme.title: Everyday Elements
programme.desc: A series that puts chemistry in our everyday experience by showing the living connection we have with the chemicals and elements that make up our world. The matter that built skies and seas, the atoms that make up you and me, the chemistry around us that forms the things we touch, smell and see. This series shows us what the objects in our universe and in our homes are made from and why the particles around us behave as they do. Everything around us is built from Everyday Elements.

programme.title: Quirky Science
programme.desc: The Internet was invented during the cold war and launched in 1969. Yet it wasnt made for the public. In fact, it was developed for the army to communicate quickly and secretly so that no spies could intercept and no bombs could disrupt the sharing of information! It was nothing like we know today. The Internet involved computers exchanging text, on a black field with green letters, and e-mail was only invented 2 years later because the developers needed a reliable tool to communicate. So only in 1972 was this application; electronic mail, introduced. The Internet we know now was actually a second, separate invention, launched over a decade and a half after the Internet was first launched, and was called the World Wide Web. Nobody was paying attention to Tim Berners-Lee and his pet idea, even though he had a radical new way for scientists to share data by linking documents to one another over the Internet! His proposal came back with the words "vague but exciting" written across the cover, so Berners-Lee took his invention to the people: with a website, bringing us the Internet we know today. Yet the Internet is only just out of its baby shoes, and is now being used to drive radical change in music and films, politics and business, changing the very way we see and interact with one another! From the computer screen to mass protests in the street, So what will the future bring us, how will the Web 3.0 change us? A web that can understand human needs?

programme.title: Inside Outer Space
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see, how we can live in space and what science tells us about the past and the future as we journey inside out of space.

programme.title: Infestation
programme.desc: Every single day there is a growing number of people to feed and in the next thirty to forty years we will need to double our food production to sustain the increase in population. In this episode author Julian Cribb examines the infestations that are threatening our food supply.

programme.title: Music Voyager
programme.desc: Music Voyager is a music and travel broadcast series (television/cable, broadband, in-flight and mobile) that invites viewers to discover the exciting sounds of the planet. The host is Jacob Edgar, an explorer who does not search for lost cities or ancient ruins. Hes on the quest for a different kind of treasure…music. As an ethnomusicologist and world music record producer, Edgar travels the globe hunting for the best songs the world has to offer, and he suffers through some of the worst…so you dont have to. Along the way, hes rewarded with a backstage pass to concert halls, street festivals, recording studios and rehearsal rooms. With local musicians as his guide, Edgar tastes exotic and occasionally ghastly food, visits off-the-beaten path attractions and parties the night away to amazing concerts at hidden venues that only the locals know. Join music voyager for unexpected adventures and surprising discoveries that unveil the magic, mystery and music of far off lands.

programme.title: Past Hunters
programme.desc: Derek Acorahs The Past Hunters continue their investigation of Knutsford Crown Court. As they delve deeper into the building, will the ghosts and spirits make contact through Derek?

programme.title: Rip Files
programme.desc: The R.I.P. Files features a group of paranormal investigators, who use intuitive abilities and a deep knowledge of metaphysical techniques to interact with the entities they encounter at haunted locations. They encourage the spirits to share their stories in their own words through amazing EVPs and other evidence that is bridging the gap between the worlds of science and spirituality.

programme.title: What In the World
programme.desc: Presented by Peadar King, this series illustrates the human consequences of global economic inequalities and human rights violations, by focusing on how people encounter these issues on a daily basis. At the heart of Africa, the Congo for many people will always be associated with Joseph Conrads early twentieth-century novel the Heart of Darkness, a title that has become a by-word for the country. And for Benjamin and David, two former child soldiers, and Funaha held as a sex slave by one of the many militias that continue to terrorise the country, that metaphor remains a daily reality. The film explores how this seemingly never-ending conflict impacts on the people of North Kivu.

programme.title: What In the World
programme.desc: Presented by Peadar King, this series illustrates the human consequences of global economic inequalities and human rights violations, by focusing on how people encounter these issues on a daily basis. programme.title: Desperate Hours
programme.desc: This episode of Desperate Hours is all about disasters at sea. The long saga of death and misadventure at sea is as much a record of human folly as it is of natures fury. When you start charting a course through the choppy seas of maritime disasters, the effect can be quite sobering. From the loss of the Titanic, a supposedly unsinkable luxury liner; to a routine ferry trip in South Korea that ended with the heart-breaking loss of so many young lives. Or how about the Exxon Valdez oil spoil, which pumped millions of gallons of crude oil into Prince William Sound, Alaska, one of the last pristine environments on earth? Then there is the return of piracy to the high seas – not as a masquerade, but as a clear and present danger. That old saying "worse things happen at sea"? Well, it turns out, they really do.

programme.title: Rv Explorers
programme.desc: RV Explorers, chasing 100 Sunsets. A TV show following a new motorhoming couple as they explore the towns and regions of NZ - experiencing various tourist attractions, events and joining in with other motorhomers to experience their favourite activities.

programme.title: Past Hunters
programme.desc: Carnfield Hall is a country house dating from the 15th and 16th Centuries. This private residence turn event hall is using its paranormal activity to draw in business. Are these spirits the old residents?

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Travel Thru History (or TTH for short) is a new educational/informational (E/I) series designed to spark interest and enthusiasm in viewers to learn about our countrys rich and fascinating history by traveling to diverse locales across the US. While it is targeted to a teen audience, the entire family will enjoy watching TTH. Videotaped and edited in the style of other popular, educational programming like Modern Marvels, Travel Thru History is the latest television series co-developed by The Television Syndication Company and Red 5 Creative.

programme.title: Travel Thru History

Videotaped and edited in the style of other popular, educational programming like Modern Marvels, Travel Thru History is the latest television series co-developed by The Television Syndication Company and Red 5 Creative.

programme.title: Natures Force
programme.desc: The beauty, magic, and the science behind the Auroras at both ends of the earth, show them to be more than just a protective magnetic layer. The technology used to measure Wind Speed is finely calibrated with an interesting formula. The Tides remind us of our connection to the moon and our place in the solar system and are monitored for any significant change can have implications for industry, communities, and our ocean life. Earthquakes often make news headlines so how are they measured and predicted and what can we learn from them about our planet? Acid Rain is a manufactured weather event, the result of manmade industry mixing with nature to result in international treaties to lessen emissions and pollution.

programme.title: Natures Force

programme.title: Big Coast
programme.desc: Running the Portland Canal from Prince Rupert to Alaska...and fishing Alaskan Halibut!

programme.title: Wild Australia with Ray Mears
programme.desc: Ray starts by hitching a lift on a research crane to get a birds eye view over the Rainforest; from there, he can see the geographical position responsible for this lush vegetation: mountain range in the west and the sea in the east. He then goes down to the ground, delving into the heart of the jungle, he comes across millennial trees, camouflage spiders and a miniature dinosaur, the Boyds Forest Dragon. He pursues his journey by travelling on a zipwire with wildlife expert, Justin McMahon. Together they observe life in the canopy. Meanwhile, Rays cameraman Martin Hayward Smith has been filming an animal that can only be found in this part of the world: the Bennetts tree kangaroo, a cute marsupial that lives like a monkey.

programme.title: Sarah Shark
programme.desc: Sarah travels to one of the top 10 dive destinations in Australia (Julian Rocks, Byron Bay, NSW) to dive with three species of Wobbegong Sharks within the Cape Byron Marine Park. She also conducts a street poll with members of the public to find out what they think about sharks.

programme.title: Out Of Town Adventures
programme.desc: Outta Town Adventures travels both near and far to discover the best advenures the destinations have to offer. Season 1 visits attractions from California to Rwanda, Switzerland, Iceland, Utah, Zambia, Mexico, The Grand Canyon, Georgia (the Eastern European one) Louisiana, Hawaii, Mauritius and Seychelles. This TV series is dedicated to presenting history, culture and geography in a fun and pisitive way. It encourages people to explore this beautiful world - something that starts with simply getting out of town!

As an ethnomusicologist and world music record producer, Edgar travels the globe hunting for the best songs the world has to offer, and he suffers through some of the worst…so you dont have to. Along the way, hes rewarded with a backstage pass to concert halls, street festivals, recording studios and rehearsal rooms. With local musicians as his guide, Edgar tastes exotic and occasionally ghastly food, visits off-the-beaten path attractions and parties the night away to amazing concerts at hidden venues that only the locals know. Join music voyager for unexpected adventures and surprising discoveries that unveil the magic, mystery and music of far off lands.

programme.title: Show Me Where You Live
programme.desc: Show me where you live is a documentary series that aims to answer the following question: How can human beings claim ownership to a space so that they can live safely within it, function as a society, and above all be in harmony with the environment around them? As we discover cultures and emblematic populations, we follow Philippe Simay who is at the heart of Inhabiting the World and represents its identity and originality. Philippe takes us on an epic adventure around the Human Habitat and sets the tone for the journey. As a humanist and philosopher, Philippe is a tireless surveyor of the city, and an explorer of living spaces. Determined to travel around the world, Philippe unveils how the populations that he encounters claim the space they occupy, shapes it and adjust to it. In this series of 20 films, of 26 minutes each, the habitat will be a major showcase revealing our capacity to adapt ourselves at a time where we need to find solutions in order to address immense changes.

programme.title: Show Me Where You Live
programme.desc: Show me where you live is a documentary series that aims to answer the following question: How can human beings claim ownership to a space so that they can live safely within it, function as a society, and above all be in harmony with the environment around them? As we discover cultures and emblematic populations, we follow Philippe Simay who is at the heart of Inhabiting the World and represents its identity and originality. Philippe takes us on an epic adventure around the Human Habitat and sets the tone for the journey. As a humanist and philosopher, Philippe is a tireless surveyor of the city, and an explorer of living spaces. In this series of 20 films, of 26 minutes each, the habitat will be a major showcase revealing our capacity to adapt ourselves at a time where we need to find solutions in order to address immense changes.

programme.title: Journeys in India
programme.desc: Join us as we explore the Gateway to India—Mumbai. From its early history, its many foreign occupations to the hustle and bustle of today. Bill tells Mumbais rich history is told through two of its most famous inhabitants, Gandhi and Kipling. We delve into the community of the Parsi faith and learn about their beliefs regarding the circle of life before heading to a little bit of heaven on earth, the coastal paradise of Goa. This hot spot for "in the know" travelers feature white, sandy beaches and is surrounded by tropical plant life. Bill introduces both the armchair and actual traveler to this incredible destination. We explore the Portuguese influence on Goas architecture and cuisine, tour the ghost city of Old Goa and explore Roman Catholic churches.

programme.title: Journeys in India
programme.desc: Journeys in India is a ground-breaking travel series focusing on the Indian subcontinent. This first season highlights the history, culture, architecture, and wildlife of one of the most mysterious and exciting areas on earth. Perfect for the would-be or armchair traveler, this 13 part series is beautifully filmed with all original footage. Join host Bill Ball as he takes you on the adventures of a lifetime!

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.desc: Gold, ivory and slaves drove the economy of the East coast of Africa 500 years ago. Join us as we explore the Portuguese and Arab roles in these horrific trade schemes. Well also investigate the pristine waters off the coast of the nearby National Park where our host dons a snorkel mask and comes face-to-face with the creatures of the coral reef.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.desc: If its rhinos you want to see, you must visit Hluhluwe-Imfolozi Wildlife Park. This huge wilderness area has the highest density of rhino in the world. In addition to the rhino, we locate a pride of lions that is truly amazing. Mkuze National Park is a treasure trove of rare antelope and various other big game. Best of all, there is often no other guests, so this is one of Africas best hidden gems.

programme.title: Nomads
programme.desc: Tanner Hall is todays most influential skier. He has won every contest, he knows every trick and there is seemingly nothing he cannot do. An idol for some, a nemesis for others, Hall is no stranger to controversy.

programme.title: Nomads
programme.desc: Follow breathtaking travel adventures of some well known athletes of extreme sports. Have a look at some stunning locations in Alaska, Mexico, Argentina, Japan, Tahiti, Africa, Costa Rica, Norway, Hawaii and whitewater kayaking, extreme big mountain skiing, windsurfing, kiteboarding, extreme snowboarding and big wave surfing that push the limits of possibility. The focus is on compelling personalities and great storytelling.

programme.title: Dream Journey
programme.desc: February 2017 saw me embark upon a travel expedition through Scotland, Poland, France, Mexico, Belize and, (alas!), back. Not only was it the first time I ventured out to Central America, but also the first time I seriously pushed my bravery boundaries to do a whole lot of things Id never tried before. I defeated my life-long fear of scubadiving and skydiving, (the Carribbean vistas do help! - No danger Id do that again in Aberdeen), I went zip-lining over a Mexican jungle, I tried habanero-packed streetfood, (failed at that miserably), and organic tequila, (managed that better;), I climbed a Maya pyramid in the middle of a Belizean rainforest and fed hibiscus flowers to a very extravagant donkey. Most importantly, however, I got to know some incredible people - from shamans, wanderers and artists to refugees, businesswomen and expat cowboys. And thanks to aaaall of that, I also got to know a little bit more about myself for visiting the most remote corners of our planet reminds you how different and yet how similar we all are. Im looking forward to sharing my incredible experience in 5 exciting episodes of our travel series, which really turned out to be a Dream Journey:) I simply cannot wait for more!

programme.title: Of Boats And Men
programme.desc: Travelling by boat bears a priceless sense of Freedom and offers endless new vistas to all passengers. Across waterways around the world Boats are an essential tool of daily life whether they carry goods, serve as utilities or services in remote areas.

programme.title: Show Me Where You Live
programme.desc: Show me where you live is a documentary series that aims to answer the following question: How can human beings claim ownership to a space so that they can live safely within it, function as a society, and above all be in harmony with the environment around them? As we discover cultures and emblematic populations, we follow Philippe Simay who is at the heart of Inhabiting the World and represents its identity and originality. Philippe takes us on an epic adventure around the Human Habitat and sets the tone for the journey. As a humanist and philosopher, Philippe is a tireless surveyor of the city, and an explorer of living spaces. Determined to travel around the world, Philippe unveils how the populations that he encounters claim the space they occupy, shapes it and adjust to it. In this series of 20 films, of 26 minutes each, the habitat will be a major showcase revealing our capacity to adapt ourselves at a time where we need to find solutions in order to address immense changes.

programme.title: Budapest Wild
programme.desc: Most of us have very little to no idea how many species we are actually sharing our flats and houses with. Rest assured, it is an uncannily surprising number.... Budapest Wild is a funny wildlife show/documentary set in the capital of Budapest, with the aim to make the average viewer look at his or her home differently the next time she looks under the sink.

programme.title: Mediterranean, In the Cetacean Footsteps
programme.desc: This documentary explores the paths of knowledge of Mediterranean Cetaceans. With scientists, veterinarians, representatives of associations, amateur or professional fishermen, we discover these mammals as well as major issues looming over their presence in this particular area of the globe. Through their very survival in the Mediterranean Sea we have a natural barometer of the """health level""" of the local ecosystem. We focus on follow various peoples during their missions on a daily basis. All with a clear stated desire in mind, that being to look through the prism of this human mosaic working on the species survival... and thus contributing on sustainable development. This assembly has the potential to increase by tenfold the general public interest towards these sea creatures.

programme.title: Animal Doctors
programme.desc: Explore how animals developed over time and generations their own medicine and health care strategies. How have these been passed onto early humans ? Questioning traditional boundaries between human and animal, we will travel from Central African Republic, to Tanzania, from the US to France with the leading experts in animal behaviour. Todays science revisits the birth of animal intelligence and culture.

programme.title: Colonies Under the Sea
programme.desc: A visually stunning and fascinating documentary. A group of divers explore shipwrecks beneath the waves of the Bahamas archipelago.

programme.title: Saving Auschwitz?
programme.desc: 70 years after Auschwitz Museum was founded as the memorial site of the Shoah, this site is subject to diversions, confrontations and plundering. Several attempts to exploit and rewrite its history are at work. The danger of desensitization through mass tourism, or the attempts of the local town and its citizens to simply erase the nightmare to make place for new urban landscape are real threats affecting the future of this memorial site. Today, as the last survivors are passing on, what to do with the Auschwitz site?

programme.title: In the Darkness
programme.desc: An immersion in the heart of the biggest West-African prison: Abidjan. Located out of sight at the border of the Banco forest, this prison host 5,000 inmates but has capacity for 1,500. With the inmates help, life inside is organized, and a degree of stability exists.

programme.title: Man Eaters
programme.desc: The first documentary about the Human-leopard conflict in Sri Lanka, "Man Eaters: A Human Leopard Story" approaches the conflict by analyzing past and present cases of man-eating leopards in Sri Lanka and what led to their strange behavior. Unlike India, man-eating leopards in Sri Lanka are very rare.

programme.title: Fentanyl - The Unstoppable Epidemic
programme.desc: Canadians attention has been briefly grabbed by the headline: the story--an abnormally high number of overdose deaths caused by a drug called fentanyl. It merited a few days attention and then was pushed off the stage by other concerns. What Canadians failed to appreciate was that those few headlines offered a foreboding glimpse of what might be one of the most destructive waves of illegal drugs to hit North America since Pablo Escobar flooded the continent with cheap and powerful cocaine. Fentanyl is a killer. And fentanyl isnt just preying on the addict population of this country. Its victims are also Canadas unsuspecting middle-class. And the epidemic is showing no signs of letting up. In fact all signs point to the death count rising as more and more powerful versions of this drug seep into the country.The result, Canadians have no idea whats "slouching" towards them in the near future. Through the eyes of four insiders in the fentanyl industry, Dam Builder Productions will take the audience inside this world in way that will enlighten, outrage, and even fascinate.

programme.title: Berber, A Quest For Water
programme.desc: In the remote valleys of the Atlas range in Morocco, lies a village Tizi Anoucheg, where water is a rare resource. Berbers are the only people to be found in this harsh environment. They convert the red and dried valleys into a lush green using ancestral irrigation methods. With climate change threatening their very existence one man rises to the occasion and tries to solve the severe water problem.

programme.title: Isetenkhebs Egyptian Coffin
programme.desc: Follow from the amazing restoration process of one of the most cherished and mysterious pieces of History: an Egyptian sarcophagus covered with hieroglyphics (painted wood). With exclusive interviews of experts, art curators and restorators, discover everything about the story of the Isetenkheb coffin of Ancient Egypt dated from around 664-500 BC !

programme.title: Remote Control War
programme.desc: The current campaigns in Iraq and Afghanistan are the worlds first Robotic War, with over 7,000 robots in the air and 12,000 on the ground. Warfare has been revolutionised in a monumental shift. Mankinds five thousand year monopoly on war is breaking down. Robotic war is here.

programme.title: 007: For Our Eyes Only
programme.desc: In anticipation of the premiere of the 25 chapter in the iconic James Bond Saga, based on the novels of British writer Ian Fleming, Sabbatical Entertainment presents FOR OUR EYES ONLY an enthralling documentary in which we will relive all of 007 dangerous mission throughout this legendary cinematic franchise, from the first feature film production in 1962, "Dr. No", to the highly anticipated "No Time To Die." In "For Our Eyes Only," get to know all the actors who have embodied the super spy: Sean Connery, George Lazenby, Roger Moore, Timothy Dalton, Pierce Brosnan, and Daniel Craig, their similarities and characteristics that differentiate each one when exhibiting his well-known charm, class and elegance, combined with physical and mental prowess, that makes 007 a real life super hero. In "For Our Eyes Only" we pay homage to the gadgets, watches, planes, submarines, but most of all, the cars 007 has used throughout the films history to survive and complete so many missions. Travel to the locations of each big budget production to honor all the memorable Bond girls who have graced the silver screen alongside the debonair secret agent, and cringe in fear remembering the Machiavellian villains and their evil plots….if it were not for Bond, James Bond. After watching Sabbatical Entertainments documentary "For Our Eyes Only" , agree it is you will agree, it definitely is "No Time To Die"

programme.title: Survivors Of the Invisible
programme.desc: One million different species of insects live on Earth. Diving into their world is kind of like adventuring to a faraway and unknown galaxy. With one difference: these living creatures do not live light-years away from us but right under our feet! With unique technologies shots developed by an Austrian entomologist, the film Survivors of the Invisible will make you discover the world of insects as you have never seen it before.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Were headed upstate to Albany and Saratoga Springs. Well take the Albany capital tour and see five former NY governors who would become US Presidents. Then, well board the USS Slater and see how America defended its fleet against German U-boats in WWII. Well sample the mineral water in Saratoga Springs, and bet the farm at their famous thoroughbred raceway. Then, well learn how important the Battle of Saratoga was for Americas future at Saratoga battlefield.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Travel Thru History (or TTH for short) is a new educational/informational (E/I) series designed to spark interest and enthusiasm in viewers to learn about our countrys rich and fascinating history by traveling to diverse locales across the US. While it is targeted to a teen audience, the entire family will enjoy watching TTH. Videotaped and edited in the style of other popular, educational programming like Modern Marvels, Travel Thru History is the latest television series co-developed by The Television Syndication Company and Red 5 Creative.

programme.title: Natures Force
programme.desc: Journey inside Dust Storms to see how they are formed and the hazards and effects they cause. A glimpse into the science of Clouds and how they fit into the weather cycle of the planet. The power of Lightening is more than visual, it is noise, electricity and it even helps plants to grow. Did you know that Rain droplets have different shapes and temperatures, its maybe more interesting than you think?

programme.title: Natures Force
programme.desc: Heatwaves have caused cities to literally meltdown and systems to fail, how are we working with natures heat? When two Cyclones collide, we get the Fujiwhara Effect, how is this possible and how does it manifest? Floods occur around the world and the world is learning how to cope, combat and prevent damage and share lessons. How do you classify a Blizzard, and lets look at some of the worst blizzards that have occurred on earth. Do you really know how to measure Rainfall and how to identify violent rain from a shower or appreciate when we have had enough or too much?

programme.title: Big Coast
programme.desc: Running Southbound outside on Central Coast with a big Tyee Chinook Release finish North of Milbanke Sound!

programme.title: Wild Australia with Ray Mears
programme.desc: Ray Mears explores the Great Barrier Reef starting on the Queensland mainland taking a boat out to Hervey Bay with whale expert Wally Franklin. They witness a mother hump back whale teaching her three month old calf the whale moves needed to survive the long migration to Antarctica.He flies out to Lady Elliot Island at the southernmost tip of the Great Barrier Reef where he goes scuba diving on the coral reef and discovers giant turtles and manta rays and shoals of big eyed trevelly fish.Back on the island Ray helps marine biologist Maggie ONeal plant a Pisonia tree and finds out how the Pisonia trees kill the Black Noddy birds that nest in them in order to use their corpses as a fertile compost given the unforgiving ground of a coral island.

programme.title: Sarah Shark
programme.desc: Sarah travels to one of the top 10 dive destinations in Australia (Julian Rocks, Byron Bay, NSW) to dive with three species of Wobbegong Sharks within the Cape Byron Marine Park. She also conducts a street poll with members of the public to find out what they think about sharks.

programme.title: Out Of Town Adventures
programme.desc: Outta Town Adventures travels both near and far to discover the best advenures the destinations have to offer. Season 1 visits attractions from California to Rwanda, Switzerland, Iceland, Utah, Zambia, Mexico, The Grand Canyon, Georgia (the Eastern European one) Louisiana, Hawaii, Mauritius and Seychelles. This TV series is dedicated to presenting history, culture and geography in a fun and pisitive way. It encourages people to explore this beautiful world - something that starts with simply getting out of town!

programme.title: Out Of Town Adventures
programme.desc: Outta Town Adventures travels both near and far to discover the best advenures the destinations have to offer. Season 1 visits attractions from California to Rwanda, Switzerland, Iceland, Utah, Zambia, Mexico, The Grand Canyon, Georgia (the Eastern European one) Louisiana, Hawaii, Mauritius and Seychelles. This TV series is dedicated to presenting history, culture and geography in a fun and pisitive way. It encourages people to explore this beautiful world - something that starts with simply getting out of town!

programme.title: Music Voyager
programme.desc: Music Voyager is a music and travel broadcast series (television/cable, broadband, in-flight and mobile) that invites viewers to discover the exciting sounds of the planet. The host is Jacob Edgar, an explorer who does not search for lost cities or ancient ruins. Hes on the quest for a different kind of treasure…music. As an ethnomusicologist and world music record producer, Edgar travels the globe hunting for the best songs the world has to offer, and he suffers through some of the worst…so you dont have to. Along the way, hes rewarded with a backstage pass to concert halls, street festivals, recording studios and rehearsal rooms. With local musicians as his guide, Edgar tastes exotic and occasionally ghastly food, visits off-the-beaten path attractions and parties the night away to amazing concerts at hidden venues that only the locals know. Join music voyager for unexpected adventures and surprising discoveries that unveil the magic, mystery and music of far off lands.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.desc: In this first of a two-parter on the Mara, we follow the migration in anticipation of the famous river crossings. We find all three big cats and hyena waiting for their chance to get their share of the migrants. During migration, the animal numbers are staggering.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.desc: One of the Seven Natural Wonders of the World—all other great wilderness areas are compared to this vast savannah. Wildlife numbers are awesome, but nothing like the numbers of the great migration. Journeys places you in the midst of this natural phenomenon where predator and prey are on a march for survival.

programme.title: Journeys in India
programme.desc: Journeys in India is a ground-breaking travel series focusing on the Indian subcontinent. This first season highlights the history, culture, architecture, and wildlife of one of the most mysterious and exciting areas on earth. Perfect for the would-be or armchair traveler, this 13 part series is beautifully filmed with all original footage. Join host Bill Ball as he takes you on the adventures of a lifetime!

programme.title: Journeys in India
programme.desc: Whether you refer to Udaipur as the City of Lakes or the City of Dawn, you are sure to agree that romance and beauty fill the air. While traveling by boat, we visit the many palaces and temples on the shore. We also tour the majestic City Palace and the Garden of the Maids of Honor. In Jaipur, we tour the Pink City, paying close attention to such architectural treasures as the Palace of Winds (Hawa Mahal) and the Amber Fort. We also visit the magnificent collections housed in the City Palace.

programme.title: Nomads
programme.desc: Follow breathtaking travel adventures of some well known athletes of extreme sports. Have a look at some stunning locations in Alaska, Mexico, Argentina, Japan, Tahiti, Africa, Costa Rica, Norway, Hawaii and whitewater kayaking, extreme big mountain skiing, windsurfing, kiteboarding, extreme snowboarding and big wave surfing that push the limits of possibility. The focus is on compelling personalities and great storytelling.

programme.title: Nomads

Have a look at some stunning locations in Alaska, Mexico, Argentina, Japan, Tahiti, Africa, Costa Rica, Norway, Hawaii and whitewater kayaking, extreme big mountain skiing, windsurfing, kiteboarding, extreme snowboarding and big wave surfing that push the limits of possibility. programme.title: Dream Journey
programme.desc: February 2017 saw me embark upon a travel expedition through Scotland, Poland, France, Mexico, Belize and, (alas!), back. Not only was it the first time I ventured out to Central America, but also the first time I seriously pushed my bravery boundaries to do a whole lot of things Id never tried before. I defeated my life-long fear of scubadiving and skydiving, (the Carribbean vistas do help! - No danger Id do that again in Aberdeen), I went zip-lining over a Mexican jungle, I tried habanero-packed streetfood, (failed at that miserably), and organic tequila, (managed that better;), I climbed a Maya pyramid in the middle of a Belizean rainforest and fed hibiscus flowers to a very extravagant donkey. Most importantly, however, I got to know some incredible people - from shamans, wanderers and artists to refugees, businesswomen and expat cowboys. And thanks to aaaall of that, I also got to know a little bit more about myself for visiting the most remote corners of our planet reminds you how different and yet how similar we all are. Im looking forward to sharing my incredible experience in 5 exciting episodes of our travel series, which really turned out to be a Dream Journey:) I simply cannot wait for more!

programme.title: Of Boats And Men
programme.desc: Travelling by boat bears a priceless sense of Freedom and offers endless new vistas to all passengers. Across waterways around the world Boats are an essential tool of daily life whether they carry goods, serve as utilities or services in remote areas.

programme.title: Show Me Where You Live

As we discover cultures and emblematic populations, we follow Philippe Simay who is at the heart of Inhabiting the World and represents its identity and originality. Determined to travel around the world, Philippe unveils how the populations that he encounters claim the space they occupy, shapes it and adjust to it. In this series of 20 films, of 26 minutes each, the habitat will be a major showcase revealing our capacity to adapt ourselves at a time where we need to find solutions in order to address immense changes.

programme.title: China Uncovered
programme.desc: Two brothers from rural China train in the art of Kung Fu in the hopes of elevating their lives however minimally. Meanwhile, rich kids in the city attend private English schools to improve their chances to study abroad. But Chinas favorite philanthropist Chen Guang Biao shares his rags-to-riches story proving that odds can indeed be beaten. Rural children in China may still dream small, but as for the young elite partying away in rooftop bars, life is sweet.

programme.title: China Uncovered
programme.desc: From the skyscrapers of Shanghai to the mountainous peaks of "The Last Shangri-La", explore the breathtaking landscape of this incredible country and connect with the people that infuse Chinas everyday life with flavor, passion and prosperity. Through the eyes of a cultural academic, a laborer, an architect, an urban planner, and a photographer, the grand evolution of a little fishing village is illustrated and documented to reveal one of the fastest growing megacities in the world. And while the physical landscape gracefully moves towards the future, beliefs, behaviors, and practices are put into test. The changes brought by the Thirty Year Miracle are indeed immense, and it has left no stone, no life, unturned.

programme.title: Stolen Treasures
programme.desc: Its the biggest museum in the world…the museum of artworks stolen over the centuries and never rediscovered. These works haunt the nightmares of their owners, and occupy the days of hundreds of police officers across the world, as well as those of a handful of private agencies; no country or museum of importance can claim to have been spared. According to Interpol, art theft is the fourth largest criminal trade, after the drug trade, the weapons trade and money laundering. How could it be otherwise, when the soaring price of art propels the value of some paintings into the tens of millions of Euros? This world appears to be full of mysteries. Crime syndicates rub shoulders with petty criminals and the police care more about recovering the items than they do about arresting the perpetrators.

programme.title: Hidden Traces
programme.desc: This documentary series uses cutting edge technology to shed new light on historical conflicts and the characters who lived through them with each episode dealing with a specific event or period in history. The viewer learns what daily life was really like for the common footsoldier during WWI as archeaologists bring their stories to life. An analysis of Napoleons strategy and the impact of the weather reveal why he was defeated by Wellington at Waterloo. Traces of the remains of Hitlers destroyed retreat on the Obersalzberg uncover the extent of the vast structural complex where he spent time with his mistress, Eva Braun. And, many years after the conflict in Vietnam, secret tunnels and unexploded bombs can still be found.

programme.title: Hidden Traces
programme.desc: This documentary series uses cutting edge technology to shed new light on historical conflicts and the characters who lived through them with each episode dealing with a specific event or period in history. programme.title: Paris - Berlin: Shapes and Shades of History
programme.desc: Paris and Berlin have developed and grown facing each other over four centuries of tumultuous historical relationships and mutual admiration. The architecture and urbanism bear witness of this complex and rich confrontation.

programme.title: Hidden Traces
programme.desc: This documentary series uses cutting edge technology to shed new light on historical conflicts and the characters who lived through them with each episode dealing with a specific event or period in history. The viewer learns what daily life was really like for the common footsoldier during WWI as archeaologists bring their stories to life. An analysis of Napoleons strategy and the impact of the weather reveal why he was defeated by Wellington at Waterloo. Traces of the remains of Hitlers destroyed retreat on the Obersalzberg uncover the extent of the vast structural complex where he spent time with his mistress, Eva Braun. And, many years after the conflict in Vietnam, secret tunnels and unexploded bombs can still be found.

programme.title: The Day When...
programme.desc: They are the men who are making History. In a time of crisis or war, any personal decision by any national leader can change everything. Like a 24h thriller, through archives and historical reconstitutions, live the day when great individual choices provoked great twists in the course of the conflict. Episodes : Churchill, De Gaulle, Roosevelt, Hitler and Staline

programme.title: Hidden Traces
programme.desc: This documentary series uses cutting edge technology to shed new light on historical conflicts and the characters who lived through them with each episode dealing with a specific event or period in history. programme.title: Hidden Traces
programme.desc: This documentary series uses cutting edge technology to shed new light on historical conflicts and the characters who lived through them with each episode dealing with a specific event or period in history. The viewer learns what daily life was really like for the common footsoldier during WWI as archeaologists bring their stories to life. An analysis of Napoleons strategy and the impact of the weather reveal why he was defeated by Wellington at Waterloo. Traces of the remains of Hitlers destroyed retreat on the Obersalzberg uncover the extent of the vast structural complex where he spent time with his mistress, Eva Braun. And, many years after the conflict in Vietnam, secret tunnels and unexploded bombs can still be found.

programme.title: Slepkavas motīvs
programme.desc: Kāds vīrietis salūzt pēc bērnības traumas rētu uzplēšanas. Vai likums viņu uztvers kā slepkavu vai cietēju?

programme.title: Duo Mix
programme.desc: Nakts programma ar mūzikas video dažādām gaumēm. Dejojiet, dziediet līdzi vai izbaudiet, guļot zem segas.

programme.title: Slepkavība, noslēpumi un mana ģimene
programme.desc: Džeremijs un Saša atkārtoti izmeklē bēdīgi slavenu gadījumu, kas datēts ar 20. gadsimta 20. gadiem. Vai kļūdaini kriminālistikas pierādījumi lika pakārt nevainīgu vīrieti?

programme.title: Slepkavas motīvs
programme.desc: Kāds vīrietis salūzt pēc bērnības traumas rētu uzplēšanas. Vai likums viņu uztvers kā slepkavu vai cietēju?

programme.title: Slepkavojošie radi
programme.desc: Nelielā Ohaio pilsētiņā ģimenes aizvainojums par 400 ASV dolāriem beidzas ar dubultslepkavību.

programme.title: Ņujorkas slepkavība
programme.desc: Policija Austrumhārlemā atklāj divus noslepkavotus mīļākos. Nozagts tālrunis ved viņus ekspedīcijā uz Ņujorkas noziedzīgās pagrīdes centru un ne tikai. Patiesība, kas slēpjas aiz asinsizliešanas, viņus pilnībā apstulbina.

programme.title: Šausmas tepat kaimiņos
programme.desc: 55 gadus vecā Monika Šmeijere savā dzīvojamajā istabā atrasta nošauta. Mierpilnie Hanoveres iedzīvotāji ir panikā. Izmeklētājiem nav ne jausmas, kurš varētu vēlēties šīs dāmas nāvi, un viņiem trūkst pavedienu vainigā meklēšanā.

programme.title: Pirmās 48 stundas
programme.desc: Pirmās 48 stundas pēc nozieguma izdarīšanas izmeklētāju darbā ir visbūtiskākās, jo tieši šis laikposms nereti izšķir to, vai noziegums tiks atšķetināts. Vēlāk izmeklētāju izredzes notvert vainīgo sarūk uz pusi. Raidījums ļauj ielūkoties ASV slepkavību izmeklētāju ikdienā, kuri neatlaidīgi strādā, lai jau pirmajās nozieguma izdarīšanas stundās atklātu pēc iespējas vairāk detaļu par ļaunprātības apstākļiem. Skatītājus sagaida reāls izmeklēšanas process, liecinieku intervijas, kriminālistiskās ekspertīzes aizkulises un iespēja ielūkoties vietās, kur nupat pastrādāts noziegums.

programme.title: Slepkavība, noslēpumi un mana ģimene
programme.desc: Advokāti Saša un Džeremijs izmeklē bēdīgi slavenu slepkavības lietu 1862. gadā Skotijā. Tajā kāds pārliecinošs aizdomās turamais, iespējams, bija patiesais slepkava.

programme.title: Slepkavas motīvs
programme.desc: Slepkava par mērķi uzstāda pilsētas likumsargu komūnu. Vai viņu notvers pirms nākamā uzbrukuma?

programme.title: Slepkavojošie radi
programme.desc: Nežēlīgās slepkavības un bruņotas laupīšanas liek Teksasas policijai sacensties ar laiku - viņiem iespējami ātri jāaptur brutālu jaunekli, goda studentu un brāļu kopu.

programme.title: Ņujorkas slepkavība
programme.desc: Ievērojams krievu uzņēmējs pazūd no neparastas apkaimes Steitenailendā. Izmeklētāji uzskata, ka vainojamas krievu bandas. Lietā tiek veikta virkne pagriezienu, lai atklātu visticamākos aizdomās turamos.

programme.title: Šausmas tepat kaimiņos
programme.desc: Savā auto Monrovijā nošauta atrasta Debija Fagana. Izmeklētāji, rokoties upura pagātnes lappusēs, atraduši neskaitāmus melus. Vai viņiem izdosies atrast, kurš vēlējās šīs divu bērnu mātes nāvi?

programme.title: Pirmās 48 stundas
programme.desc: Izmeklētāju darbā pirmās 48 stundas pēc slepkavības izdarīšanas ir visbūtiskākās, jo tieši šis laikposms nereti izšķir to, vai noziegums tiks atšķetināts. Raidījums ļauj ielūkoties ASV slepkavību izmeklētāju ikdienā, kuri neatlaidīgi strādā, lai jau pirmajās nozieguma izdarīšanas stundās atklātu pēc iespējas vairāk detaļu par ļaunprātības apstākļiem. programme.title: Slepkavība, noslēpumi un mana ģimene
programme.desc: Saša un Džeremijs pēta lietu, kurā pretrunīgi vērtētā policista nogalināšana lika aizdomās turēt desmitiem cilvēku un beidzās ar trīs vīriešu došanos uz karātavām.

programme.title: Slepkavas motīvs
programme.desc: Kad Kalifornijā pazūd četru cilvēku, tostarp divu mazu bērnu, ģimene, policija uzskata, ka viņi aizbēguši. Paiet desmitgade līdz atklājas - viņus nogalinājis slepkava, kas nozieguma brīdī nemaz nebija slēpies.

programme.title: Slepkavojošie radi
programme.desc: Maskās tērptu bruņotu cilvēku iebrukums mājās noved pie Hjūstonas ārsta slepkavības - viņš centās aizstāvēt sevi, savu māju un ģimeni.

programme.title: Ņujorkas slepkavība
programme.desc: Ņujorkas policijas izmeklētāji meklē slepkavu, kurš spīdzināja un izpildīja nāvessodu visu mīļotajai Ņujorkas publiskās skolas skolotājai. Viņi atklāj, ka upuris ir spēcīga uzņēmēja dēls.

programme.title: Šausmas tepat kaimiņos
programme.desc: Pēc došanās zvejot, Džesika Evansa un Džeikobs Vīlers tā arī nepārnāca mājās. Pēcāk Vīlera pamestā automašīna tiek atrasta, un tās bagāžas nodalījumā - miris cilvēks.

programme.title: Pirmās 48 stundas
programme.desc: Pirmās 48 stundas pēc nozieguma izdarīšanas izmeklētāju darbā ir visbūtiskākās, jo tieši šis laikposms nereti izšķir to, vai noziegums tiks atšķetināts. programme.title: Duo Mix
programme.desc: Nakts programma ar mūzikas video dažādām gaumēm. Dejojiet, dziediet līdzi vai izbaudiet, guļot zem segas.

programme.title: Divarpus vīri
programme.desc: Divi brāļi nevarētu būt dažādāk –: Čārlijam ir viss, ko dzīvē var vēlēties: nauda, skaista māja okeāna piekrastē, pavisam nedaudz darāmā un neskaitāmas draudzenes. Turpretī Alans ir īsts neveiksminieks – no viņa ir izšķīrusies sieva, kura ir paturējusi sev abu kopīgi iegādāto māju, un Alans nespēj savilkt kopā galus, lai samaksātu rēķinus. Tā kā Alanam nav pa kabatai atļauties savu mājokli, viņš lūdz Čārlijam atļauju padzīvot pie viņa kādu laiciņu, kamēr apradīs ar jauno situāciju un atradīs pats savu mājvietu. Viņi pat nenojauta, uz cik ilgu laiku tas ievilksies un cik daudz jautrības tas sagādās skatītājiem.

programme.title: Jaunais Šeldons
programme.desc: Iepazīstieties - bērns ģēnijs vārdā Šeldons Kūpers (ar viņu kā pieaugušo būsiet jau satikušies seriālā "Lielā sprādziena teorija") un viņa ģimene. Sociāli savādo Šeldonu dzīvē vajā dažādi unikāli izaicinājumi.

programme.title: Jaunais Šeldons
programme.desc: Iepazīstieties - bērns ģēnijs vārdā Šeldons Kūpers (ar viņu kā pieaugušo būsiet jau satikušies seriālā "Lielā sprādziena teorija") un viņa ģimene. Sociāli savādo Šeldonu dzīvē vajā dažādi unikāli izaicinājumi.

programme.title: Pidurdunud areng
programme.desc: Maikla meklējumi pēc noslēpumainās "N. Blūtas" aizved viņu pie Nellijas, prostitūtas, kuru viņš uzskata par savu pazudušo māsu, un kura, iespējams, var visu izskaidrot. Tikmēr Bastera viltus koma izraisa ārstu sašutumu.

programme.title: Pidurdunud areng
programme.desc: Džobs piedalās USO programmā un dodas uz Irāku, taču drīz vien viņu aiztur ASV bruņotie spēki. Prokurori uzskata, ka viņa rīcība ir nodevība, tāpēc Maikls un Basters dodas uz Irāku, lai atbrīvotu Džobu. Tur viņi apmeklē pašu uzņēmuma celto māju un atklāj, kas tajā slēpjas.

programme.desc: Divi brāļi nevarētu būt dažādāk –: Čārlijam ir viss, ko dzīvē var vēlēties: nauda, skaista māja okeāna piekrastē, pavisam nedaudz darāmā un neskaitāmas draudzenes. programme.title: Jaunais Šeldons
programme.desc: Iepazīstieties - bērns ģēnijs vārdā Šeldons Kūpers (ar viņu kā pieaugušo būsiet jau satikušies seriālā "Lielā sprādziena teorija") un viņa ģimene. Sociāli savādo Šeldonu dzīvē vajā dažādi unikāli izaicinājumi.

programme.title: Ofiss
programme.desc: Kāda Amerikas uzņēmuma reģionālais menedžeris Maikls Skots ir neprecējies vīrietis pusmūža gados. Viņš ir pārliecināts, ka ir ofisa lielākais jokpēteris, biznesa guru un labs visu darbinieku draugs. Maikls pat nenojauš, ka pārējie viņu uzskata par diezgan aprobežotu tipu un izturas iecietīgi tikai tādēļ, ka viņš parakstās uz algas čekiem. Ofisa biroja administratore ir draudzīgā un saprātīgā Pema Bīslija, kas ik dienas spiesta paciest Maikla citu par citu vājprātīgākās idejas. Pemas patīkamākā dienas daļa saistās ar Džimu Halpertu, jauku puisi ar lielisku humora izjūtu (turklāt Džims ir līdz ausīm iemīlējies Pemā). Ofisā strādā arī Dvaits Štrūts, iedomīgs reģionālā menedžera asistents, Raiens Hovards - jauns, gudrs, ar sevi pārņemts vīrietis, kā arī citi kolorīti tēli. Ironisks, melns un skarbi tiešs gudra humora cienītājiem - tāds ir seriāls "Ofiss.

Viņš ir pārliecināts, ka ir ofisa lielākais jokpēteris, biznesa guru un labs visu darbinieku draugs. Ofisa biroja administratore ir draudzīgā un saprātīgā Pema Bīslija, kas ik dienas spiesta paciest Maikla citu par citu vājprātīgākās idejas. Pemas patīkamākā dienas daļa saistās ar Džimu Halpertu, jauku puisi ar lielisku humora izjūtu (turklāt Džims ir līdz ausīm iemīlējies Pemā). Ofisā strādā arī Dvaits Štrūts, iedomīgs reģionālā menedžera asistents, Raiens Hovards - jauns, gudrs, ar sevi pārņemts vīrietis, kā arī citi kolorīti tēli. Ironisks, melns un skarbi tiešs gudra humora cienītājiem - tāds ir seriāls "Ofiss.

programme.title: Pidurdunud areng
programme.desc: Maikla meklējumi pēc noslēpumainās "N. Blūtas" aizved viņu pie Nellijas, prostitūtas, kuru viņš uzskata par savu pazudušo māsu, un kura, iespējams, var visu izskaidrot. Tikmēr Bastera viltus koma izraisa ārstu sašutumu.

programme.title: Pidurdunud areng
programme.desc: Džobs piedalās USO programmā un dodas uz Irāku, taču drīz vien viņu aiztur ASV bruņotie spēki. Prokurori uzskata, ka viņa rīcība ir nodevība, tāpēc Maikls un Basters dodas uz Irāku, lai atbrīvotu Džobu. Tur viņi apmeklē pašu uzņēmuma celto māju un atklāj, kas tajā slēpjas.

programme.title: Draugi
programme.desc: Seriāla galvenie varoņi ir seši draugi - Reičela, Monika, Fēbe, Džoijs, Čendlers un Ross, kuri dzīvo kaimiņos un regulāri nonāk aizraujošās un ļoti komiskās situācijās.

programme.title: Mamma

programme.title: Mamma
programme.desc: Nesen atlabusi vientuļā māte mēģina sakārtot savu dzīvi Napas ielejā, vienlaikus cīnoties ar savu niķīgo māti.

programme.title: Divarpus vīri
programme.desc: Divi brāļi nevarētu būt dažādāk –: Čārlijam ir viss, ko dzīvē var vēlēties: nauda, skaista māja okeāna piekrastē, pavisam nedaudz darāmā un neskaitāmas draudzenes. Turpretī Alans ir īsts neveiksminieks – no viņa ir izšķīrusies sieva, kura ir paturējusi sev abu kopīgi iegādāto māju, un Alans nespēj savilkt kopā galus, lai samaksātu rēķinus. Tā kā Alanam nav pa kabatai atļauties savu mājokli, viņš lūdz Čārlijam atļauju padzīvot pie viņa kādu laiciņu, kamēr apradīs ar jauno situāciju un atradīs pats savu mājvietu. Viņi pat nenojauta, uz cik ilgu laiku tas ievilksies un cik daudz jautrības tas sagādās skatītājiem.

programme.title: Ofiss
programme.desc: Kāda Amerikas uzņēmuma reģionālais menedžeris Maikls Skots ir neprecējies vīrietis pusmūža gados. Viņš ir pārliecināts, ka ir ofisa lielākais jokpēteris, biznesa guru un labs visu darbinieku draugs. Maikls pat nenojauš, ka pārējie viņu uzskata par diezgan aprobežotu tipu un izturas iecietīgi tikai tādēļ, ka viņš parakstās uz algas čekiem. Ofisa biroja administratore ir draudzīgā un saprātīgā Pema Bīslija, kas ik dienas spiesta paciest Maikla citu par citu vājprātīgākās idejas. Pemas patīkamākā dienas daļa saistās ar Džimu Halpertu, jauku puisi ar lielisku humora izjūtu (turklāt Džims ir līdz ausīm iemīlējies Pemā). Ofisā strādā arī Dvaits Štrūts, iedomīgs reģionālā menedžera asistents, Raiens Hovards - jauns, gudrs, ar sevi pārņemts vīrietis, kā arī citi kolorīti tēli. Ironisks, melns un skarbi tiešs gudra humora cienītājiem - tāds ir seriāls "Ofiss.

programme.title: Amerikāņu ģimenīte
programme.desc: Džejs aizved Gloriju pie Deivida Brennera. Mičels un Kamerons cenšas pierunāt Meniju uz randiņu. Fils un Klēra cenšas paspilgtināt lietas, dodoties romantiskā atpūtā.

programme.title: Amerikāņu ģimenīte
programme.desc: Trešajā mēģinājumā nokārtot auto eksāmenu Heilija saskaras ar biedējošu braukšanas eksaminētāju. Aleksu satrauc skolas dejas. Glorija apsmej Džeju un Meniju, lai viņi izbrauktu ar amerikāņu kalniņiem. Fils un Lūks zem mājas meklē dārgumus.

programme.title: Pidurdunud areng
programme.desc: Atgriežoties mājās no Irākas, Džordžs vecākais beidzot tiek attaisnots, un Maikls ir atvieglots, jo beidzot vada veiksmīgu uzņēmumu. Atklājas patiesais vaininieks visam trakumam, un tiklīdz ģimene sāk svinēt uzvaru, parādās pavisam jaunas problēmas.

programme.title: Pidurdunud areng
programme.desc: Maikls atvadās no ģimenes biznesa un dibina savu uzņēmumu. Ģimenes dzīve sagriežas kājām gaisā, kad nomirst viņu pastnieks Pīts.

programme.title: Amerikāņu ģimenīte
programme.desc: Džejs nejauši nogalina Menija bruņurupuci un melo par to. Klēra kļūst greizsirdīga - Fila bijusī draudzene ieradusies ciemos. Mičels pieņem drosmīgu lēmumu. Viņš nokavējis ģimenes dienu, jo viņam bija jābūt darbā.

programme.title: Amerikāņu ģimenīte
programme.desc: Džejs un Mičels mēģina izveidot attiecības, vērojot meteoru lietu, taču nekas nenotiek saskaņā ar plānu. Glorija un Kamerons cenšas atrast kaut ko citu, lai pavadītu kopīgi laiku. Klēra un Fils cenšas palīdzēt saviem bērniem viņu skolas projektos.

programme.title: Kailā pievilcība
programme.desc: Savdabīgs randiņu šovs, kurā cilvēki līdz ar mīlas peripetijām iepazīstas ar pakāpeniski atkalinātiem ķermeņiem. Pēcāk jāizģērbjas arī viņiem pašiem un jāizvēlas.

programme.desc: Kāda Amerikas uzņēmuma reģionālais menedžeris Maikls Skots ir neprecējies vīrietis pusmūža gados. Viņš ir pārliecināts, ka ir ofisa lielākais jokpēteris, biznesa guru un labs visu darbinieku draugs. Maikls pat nenojauš, ka pārējie viņu uzskata par diezgan aprobežotu tipu un izturas iecietīgi tikai tādēļ, ka viņš parakstās uz algas čekiem. Ofisa biroja administratore ir draudzīgā un saprātīgā Pema Bīslija, kas ik dienas spiesta paciest Maikla citu par citu vājprātīgākās idejas. Pemas patīkamākā dienas daļa saistās ar Džimu Halpertu, jauku puisi ar lielisku humora izjūtu (turklāt Džims ir līdz ausīm iemīlējies Pemā). Ofisā strādā arī Dvaits Štrūts, iedomīgs reģionālā menedžera asistents, Raiens Hovards - jauns, gudrs, ar sevi pārņemts vīrietis, kā arī citi kolorīti tēli. Ironisks, melns un skarbi tiešs gudra humora cienītājiem - tāds ir seriāls "Ofiss.

programme.title: Pidurdunud areng
programme.desc: Atgriežoties mājās no Irākas, Džordžs vecākais beidzot tiek attaisnots, un Maikls ir atvieglots, jo beidzot vada veiksmīgu uzņēmumu. Atklājas patiesais vaininieks visam trakumam, un tiklīdz ģimene sāk svinēt uzvaru, parādās pavisam jaunas problēmas.

programme.title: Pidurdunud areng
programme.desc: Maikls atvadās no ģimenes biznesa un dibina savu uzņēmumu. Ģimenes dzīve sagriežas kājām gaisā, kad nomirst viņu pastnieks Pīts.

programme.title: Divarpus vīri
programme.desc: Divi brāļi nevarētu būt dažādāk –: Čārlijam ir viss, ko dzīvē var vēlēties: nauda, skaista māja okeāna piekrastē, pavisam nedaudz darāmā un neskaitāmas draudzenes. Turpretī Alans ir īsts neveiksminieks – no viņa ir izšķīrusies sieva, kura ir paturējusi sev abu kopīgi iegādāto māju, un Alans nespēj savilkt kopā galus, lai samaksātu rēķinus. Tā kā Alanam nav pa kabatai atļauties savu mājokli, viņš lūdz Čārlijam atļauju padzīvot pie viņa kādu laiciņu, kamēr apradīs ar jauno situāciju un atradīs pats savu mājvietu. Viņi pat nenojauta, uz cik ilgu laiku tas ievilksies un cik daudz jautrības tas sagādās skatītājiem.

programme.title: Amerikāņu ģimenīte
programme.desc: Džejs nejauši nogalina Menija bruņurupuci un melo par to. Klēra kļūst greizsirdīga - Fila bijusī draudzene ieradusies ciemos. Mičels pieņem drosmīgu lēmumu. Viņš nokavējis ģimenes dienu, jo viņam bija jābūt darbā.

programme.title: Amerikāņu ģimenīte
programme.desc: Džejs un Mičels mēģina izveidot attiecības, vērojot meteoru lietu, taču nekas nenotiek saskaņā ar plānu. Glorija un Kamerons cenšas atrast kaut ko citu, lai pavadītu kopīgi laiku. Klēra un Fils cenšas palīdzēt saviem bērniem viņu skolas projektos.

programme.title: Amerikāņu ģimenīte
programme.desc: Džejs izaicina Gloriju un Meniju uz izcilu šaha spēli. Klēra dara visu, lai atrastu jaunu gadžetu Fila dzimšanas dienas dāvanai, bet Kamerons bāž degunu kaimiņu lietās.

programme.title: Amerikāņu ģimenīte
programme.desc: Džejs un Fils sacenšas par vienu un to pašu trenera vietu Menija un Lūka basketbola komandā. Mičels palīdz Kameronam darba intervijā. Glorija un Klēra runā par bērnu augšanu.

programme.title: Planīca
programme.desc: A full broadcast of the Ski Jumping World Cup in the Alpine valley of Planica, Slovenia, hosted by International Ski Federation (FIS). The cup is the most prestigious competition in ski jumping and welcomes only the best ski jumpers from around the world. Ski jumping is a skiing discipline, wherein the athletes equipped with skis slide down from a steep and curved ramp in an attempt to make the farthest jump.

programme.desc: A full broadcast of the Ski Jumping World Cup in the Alpine valley of Planica, Slovenia, hosted by International Ski Federation (FIS). The cup is the most prestigious competition in ski jumping and welcomes only the best ski jumpers from around the world. Ski jumping is a skiing discipline, wherein the athletes equipped with skis slide down from a steep and curved ramp in an attempt to make the farthest jump.

programme.title: "Volta a Catalunya". Barcelona - Barcelona (95,1 km)
programme.desc: Volta a Catalunya is a road bicycle race held annually in Catalonia, Spain. It is considered to be one of three World Tour stage races in Spain, together with the Vuelta a España and the Tour of the Basque Country. The race covers the autonomous community of Catalonia in Northeast Spain, goes through the mountain region of the Pyrenees and traditionally finishes with a stage in Barcelona, Catalonias capital.

programme.title: In Flanders Fields _ From Middelkerke to Wevelgem
programme.desc: Gent–Wevelgem – In Flanders Fields, is a road cycling race in Belgium, held annually since 1934. It is one of the classic races part of the Flemish Cycling Week.

programme.title: Pasaules kauss Monsenanā. Monsenana – snovborda kross
Freestyle Skiing - World Cup
programme.desc: The World Cup of Freestyle Skiing allows the best of the rest from their respected countries, to compete against one another on an international stage. Held annually, this world cup has been organised and implemented by the International Ski Federation, since 1980. Disciplines, such as limitless aerials and daring half-pipes, well leave you on the edge of your seat as you await the fate of their exploits. With countries such as Canada, France and Russia competing in appropriate locations like South Korea and China, it really is an extreme sport hat is watched and accommodated, all over the world. Spectators from across a whole host of continents, congregate at the bottom of the ski slope to support and cheers their winter icons. Which nation will be triumphant this year?

programme.title: Дневники Темного
programme.desc: Телеканал ТЕТ подготовил для вас нечто очень неожиданное. Проект придется по вкусу всем любителям загадочных мистических историй. События происходят в фантастическом городе Темный. В нем живут вампиры, оборотни и другие существа. Все здесь живет и дышит, даже стены домов. Попасть в этот загадочный город совсем не сложно, а вот покинуть - невероятно сложно. Однажды в город приезжает журналист. Его задача - освещать события, происходящие в Темном. Однако все осложняется тем, что отличить где правда, а где только галлюцинации, в городе бывает невероятно трудно. В каждом выпуске он расследует новые мистические дела. Удастся ли ему раскрыть их и спасти жизни людей? Сможет ли журналист выжить в таинственном городе? А выбраться из него? - Узнавайте в мистическом сериалы "Дневники Темного".

programme.title: Страх в твоем доме
programme.desc: Боль и страдания, которые причиняют самые близкие люди, невыносимы. Дом из крепости становится тюрьмой. И в поисках выхода людям приходится идти на самые невероятные поступки. Ни один сценарист не сможет придумать такие сюжетные ходы, которые порой закручивает сама жизнь. В социальной докудраме "Страх в твоем доме" - только реальные истории, случившиеся с реальными людьми. Мы реконструируем события, основываясь на откровенных рассказах их участников, а наши эксперты - юристы и психологи - комментируют их и помогают найти выход из сложных, порой тупиковых ситуаций.

programme.title: Страх в твоем доме
programme.desc: Боль и страдания, которые причиняют самые близкие люди, невыносимы. Дом из крепости становится тюрьмой. И в поисках выхода людям приходится идти на самые невероятные поступки.
