"Vides fakti" sniedz informāciju par sezonālām norisēm dabā un dzīvnieku pasaulē, par vides aktualitātēm, par videi draudzīgu dzīvesveidu, par aktuālām cilvēka un vides attiecībām ārpus Latvijas robežām. Raidījumā "Vides fakti" ir skatāmi arī piedzīvojumu sižeti par aktīvā tūrisma iespējām Latvijā, kā arī īsfilmas par neparastiem ceļojumiem pasaulē.

programme.title: Daudz laimes, jubilār!
programme.desc: Redaktore un scenāriju autore Sandra Freiberga Latvijas Televīzijai ir īsts ieguvums - viņas veidotais projekts "V.I.P. - Veiksme. Intuīcija. Prāts" ar vadītāju Uģi Jokstu centrā ir viens no skatītāju iemīļotākajiem raidījumiem, noturējies ēterā padsmit gadus (kopš 2010) un aizvien nebeidz uzdot āķīgus jautājumus. Šī nav vienīgā erudīcijas spēle, kas, Sandras veidota, piesaistījusi skatītāju tūkstošus cauri gadu desmitiem. Iepriekš bija projekts "Mini mani!", ko talantīgā žurnāliste vadīja pati, ekspertu žūrijā pieaicinot harismātiskos Ojāru Rubeni, Ausmu Kantāni, Juri Karlsonu, Vitu Jermoloviču, vēlāk arī Ilzi Vazdiku un citas populāras un tautā mīlētas personības. Interesants bija arī Freibergas veidotais projekts "Zini vai mini!". "Man vienmēr nācies savus projektus radīt pašai," atzīstas Freiberga. "Gandrīz nekad nav bijis tā, ka tos izveidotu kāds cits un aicinātu mani darbā," viņas balsī ieskanas mazliet smeldzīga nots. Taču, ja ieskatāmies arhīvā, kopā ar režisori Svetlanu Rudzīti, kas bijusi arī Sandras veidoto erudīcijas spēļu režisore, redaktorei bijusi iespēja piedalīties daudzu muzikālu šovu un pasākumu veidošanā. "Tā ir. Sveta mani pieaicināja daudzos muzikālos projektos. Gan Maestro Jāņu vakara svētku pasākumos, gan arī lieliskajos koncertos Kuldīgas estrādē, kam rakstīju scenārijus," apstiprina Freiberga. "Raidījumu ir bijis tik daudz, visus nudien neatceros." Skatoties fragmentus no dažādiem agrāk veidotiem raidījumiem, Sandra ik pa laikam pārsteigumā paceļ uzacis. Piemēram: "Ak, biju aizmirsusi, ka savulaik intervēju Al Bano un Rominu Paueri!" viņa izsaucas. "Tolaik, kad viņi sniedza koncertu Dzintaru koncertzālē. Tas bija tik sen!" Latvijas Sabiedriskā medija arhīvs patiešām glabā vērtības, ko prieks un interesanti skatīties ne tikai pieredzējušajai televīzijas redaktorei, bet arī skatītājiem. Raidījumā būs fragmenti no projektiem: "Apvārsnis", "Mozaīka", "Videofakts", "Pauze", "Laimes spēle", "Mini mani!", "Zini vai mini", "Citādi latviskais", "Nāc līdzās!", "Radīti mūzikai" un citiem.

programme.title: Revidents
programme.desc: Gada aukstajos mēnešos strauji izplatās dažādas saslimšanas. Un katru gadu starp izplatītākajām ir iesnas. Statistika pat rāda, ka pieaugušie ar tām sirgst vidēji divas līdz trīs reizes gadā, bet bērni – četras reizes biežāk. Aizlikts vai tekošs deguns var radīt diezgan sliktu pašsajūtu, kuru sola "saārstēt" dažādi recepšu un arī bezrecepšu medikamenti. To, kā šādus solījumus vērtē veselības eksperti, "Revidenta" komanda skaidros šīs nedēļas raidījumā. Savus komentārus un padomus sniegs otolaringoloģe un RSU Otorinolaringoloģijas katedras vadītāja Gunta Sumeraga, kā arī farmaceits Vadims Brižaņs.

programme.title: LV jaunatklāšanas raidījums "TE!"
programme.desc: Astoņās raidījuma sērijās, ceļojot laikā caur Latvijas pagātni, tagadni un potenciālo nākotni, ar piedzīvojuma garšu, rotaļīgumu un izteiktu klātbūtnes sajūtu "TE!" vedīs jaunos Latvijas apceļošanas piedzīvojumos. Raidījumu vada Marta Selecka, Dace Salnāja, Māris Olte, Pauls Timrots, Māra Sleja un Gustavs Terzens. Raidījumu veido "VFS Films", un projektu līdzfinansē Mediju atbalsta fonds no Latvijas valsts budžeta līdzekļiem.

programme.title: Alpu dakteris
programme.desc: Nav labākas vietas, kur patverties no pilsētas kņadas, trokšņa un stresa, kā kalni. Bet dzīvot tur? Dzimto Alpu mazpilsētiņu, saucot tās gaisotni par smacējošu un aprobežotu, Mārtins pameta jau pirms daudziem gadiem, lai kļūtu par veiksmīgu ārstu kosmopolītiskajā lielpilsētā Ņujorkā. Nu viņš ir atgriezies. Uz pavisam īsu apciemojumu, lai atkal drīz atvadītos. Taču no likteņa neizbēgsi - atgriešanās mājās izrādās uz palikšanu. Jo pārāk liels ir trieciens, uzzinot, ka viņa pirmā mīlestība, kas pēc Mārtina aizbraukšanas apprecēja viņa paša brāli Hansu, ir mirusi. Taču atstājusi meitu, par kuras esamību Mārtins nekad pat nebija zinājis! Ar to izrādās pietiekami, lai izlemtu palikt Pēkšņi kļuvis par tēvu, Mārtins vēlas uzzināt vairāk par savu jauniegūto meitu Lili, iemantot viņas uzticēšanos. Tā dēļ viņš ir gatavs pat mēģināt sadarboties ar savu jaunāko brāli Hansu, kas joprojām jūt aizvainojumu. Hanss ir kļuvis par glābēju komandas vadītāju, un kopā ar Mārtinu viņi turpmāk neskaitāmas reizes riskēs ar savu dzīvību, lai glābtu kalnu negadījumu upurus vai kāpējus, ko pārsteigusi pēkšņa vētra. Mārtinu gaida atklāsme, ka bez saknēm nav iespējas turpināt dzīvi. Šeit viņš pilnībā aptvers arī to, ka būt par ārstu kalnos - tā nav tikai profesija, bet gan aicinājums. Kļūt par labu neatliekamās medicīniskās palīdzības sniedzēju kalnos iemācīties nevar, par tādu piedzimst. Un Mārtins Grūbers tāds neapšaubāmi ir!

programme.title: Milānas-Kortīnas 2026. gada ziemas olimpiskās spēles
programme.desc: Somija hokejā ir ļoti spēcīga, un tā ir iepriekšējo ziemas olimpisko spēļu čempione Pekinā. Toreiz gan nepiedalījās NHL hokejisti, bet arī somiem netrūkst zvaigžņu pasaulē spēcīgākajā hokeja līgā. Sešu iepriekš nominēto spēlētāju vidū olimpiskajam turnīram ir uzbrucēji Sebastians Aho, Aleksandrs Barkovs, Miko Rantanens. Aizsargu vidū iekļauti Miro Heiskanens un Esa Lindels, no vārtsargiem pirmais tika nominēts Juse Saross. Tās visas ir zvaigznes, bet arī bez viņiem somiem ir vēl daudz citu izcilu spēlētāju NHL, kaut vai Mikaels Granlunds, Patriks Laine, Toivo Teranainens. Somu sastāvā šoreiz būs tikai viens hokejists no Eiropas līgām (Miko Lehtonens no Šveices līgas). Tāpat ļoti spēcīga ir arī Zviedrijas izlase, kurai ir ļoti liela pārstāvniecība NHL un faktiski visi spēlētāji ir no šīs līgas.

programme.title: Eiropa fokusā
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls

Kaspars Kalniņš - ikdienā brauc pa Latviju un veic dzērienu ražošanas iekārtu uzstādīšanu un apkopi. Futbolā savu spēles stilu raksturo ar vārdiem - galvenais uzbrukums ir aizsardzība. "Edgariem" pievienojies pērnajā vasarā. Bez futbola un pārgājieniem vēl atrod laiku tautas deju mēģinājumiem un koncertiem. Eriks Dekoneks - maizi pelna ar darbu ofisā un ir ceļā uz jaunām virsotnēm, proti, autovadītāja apliecību. Klubam "Edgari United" pievienojies pērnā gada novembrī. Komandas diriģents ar snaipera precizitāti. Bez futbola - literāts - rakstnieks un tulkotājs. Kā pats atzīst, viņa sirds pieder divām lietām - Prāgai un mīļotajai sievietei.

programme.title: Kultūršoks
programme.desc: Kultūra ir ne vien māksla, bet arī nauda, projekti, ražošana un gan radoši, gan postoši konflikti. Par kultūrvides problēmām un šokējošām atklāsmēm — raidījums "Kultūršoks".

programme.title: Mūzikas burve Keita Buša
programme.desc: Dokumentālais stāsts par daudzpusīgo leģendu Keitu Bušu - dziesmu autori, komponisti, dziedātāju, dejotāju un performanču mākslinieci. Viņas radītās dziesmas pavēra jaunus apvāršņus, ienesot popmūzikā vēl nepieredzētu savādību, poētisku un radikālu skanējumu. Keita Buša daudzējādā ziņā bija pioniere, viņa kontrolēja savu albumu producēšanu, radīja multimediālus un teatrālus koncertus un uzņēma savus videoklipus vēl krietni pirms "MTV" parādīšanās. Intervijās ar Keitu Bušu un viņas līdzgaitniekiem tiek atklāts viņas daiļrades brīnumainais un joprojām suģestējošais spēks, kas turpina iedvesmot arī jauno paaudzi.

programme.title: Komisārs Reksis
programme.desc: Doktors Grāfs kļūst par liecinieku slepkavības mēģinājumam, kā dēļ cietušais iegūst smagus atmiņas traucējumus. Lai arī izmeklētājiem drīz izdodas noskaidrot viņa identitāti, tikai viņš pats varētu paskaidrot policijai, kāpēc ir kļuvis par slepkavu mērķi - ja vien to atcerētos. Par laimi, Reksis ir gatavs kļūt par palīgu terapijā, kas palīdzēs cietušajam atgūt savu atmiņu un izmeklētājiem - atšķetināt noziegumu.

programme.title: Septiņi senās pasaules brīnumi
programme.desc: Betanija Hjūsa dodas uz Anatoliju un Tuvajiem Austrumiem. Viņa atklāj Halikarnāsas mauzoleja stāstu, Efesas Artemīdas tempļa varenību un mēģina noskaidrot, vai Babilonas gaisa dārzi patiešām eksistēja.

programme.title: Šerifs
programme.desc: Žans Klods, Lionas prokurors, atrasts miris savā kabinetā. Nozieguma vietā Roksana saņem īsziņu no Kadera, kurš apgalvo, ka apmaldījies un uz notikuma vietu dodas drīz. Tikmēr atklājas, ka ziņas nosūtītājs nav bijis vis Kaders, jo viņš atrodas ieslodzījumā bez sava telefona.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Seriāls "Policijas iecirknis 31" seko stāstam par detektīvseržanti Nadīnu Legrānu un viņas kolēģi Patriku Bisonē, kā arī citiem viņu biedriem policijas iecirknī, kur viņi sastopas ar ikdienas noziegumiem, kas notiek lielajās pilsētās: slepkavības, nolaupīšanas, ielaušanās, vardarbība ģimenē, narkotiku tirdzniecība, terorisms un daudz kas cits.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Vezo aiztur Levasēru, Lorāns mēģina no viņa izdabūt informāciju, kur ir Amēlija. Izabella nopratina Robēnu, kas, iespējams, ir saistīts ar mirušā jaunieša lietu. Visi meklē Benuā Lorēnu, kurš ir ar Amēliju.

programme.title: Zinātnes noslēpumi
programme.desc: Dažādas mūsu ikdienā ierastas darbības un notikumi, izskaidroti no zinātnes viedokļa.

programme.title: Dalgliešs
programme.desc: Strīds par ģimenes muzeja nākotni beidzas ar traģēdiju, kad viens no Dupeinu ģimenes brāļiem iet bojā aizdomīgā ugunsgrēkā. Vecākais detektīvinspektors Dalgliešs izmeklē noziegumu, kurā aizdomās turami visi muzeja darbinieki. Kad tiek atrasts vēl viens upuris, atklājas slepena sabiedrība, šantāža un bīstami noslēpumi, kas draud iznīcināt daudzu cilvēku dzīves. Izmeklēšanā atklājas, ka slepkavības saknes meklējamas mantkārībā, manipulācijā un bailēs no atmaskošanas.

programme.title: Eiropa fokusā
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls

programme.title: Ielas garumā
programme.desc: Piņķi nav tikai Pierīgai raksturīgā ainava, ko pamanām, traucoties pa Jūrmalas šoseju: jaunbūvju ciemats, ledus halle, liels tirdzniecības centrs, starptautiskā skola, jāšanas sporta halle. Aiz šīm būvēm ir vēl citi Piņķi, ko līdz Atmodai pazina kā Salienu, jo padomju laikā tur uzcēla sovhoza "Saliena" (vēlāk Bulduru sovhoztehnikums) centru. Tagad tur pulsē ciemata izglītības un kultūras dzīve. Bet pavisam maz palicis no vēsturiskajiem Piņķiem, ko Rīgas rāte sāka veidot 1602. gadā kā Piņķu muižu. Lielākoties tie ir arhīva dokumenti, pāris fotogrāfijas, atmiņu stāsti un mēmais liecinieks laikmetu griežos - 1874. gadā celtā Piņķu baznīca, ko dzejnieks Aleksandrs Čaks iemūžinājis latviešu strēlniekiem veltītajā poēmā "Mūžības skartie".

programme.title: Ielas garumā
programme.desc: Šoreiz atgriezīsimies mums labi pazīstamās Rīgas apkaimēs. Mežciems, kā arī Krāsotāju un Avotu iela "Ielas garumā" izstaigāti krustu šķērsu, bet katra jauna paaudze pilsētā pamana un izceļ kādas tai interesantas un svarīgas nianses. Šos pilsētvides stāstus apkopo izaicinājumu un risinājumu platforma "Tandeems", tāpēc dosimies pastaigā kopā ar dažiem sacensības "Pilsētas leģendas" laureātiem Savukārt dzīvei Čiekurkalnā sekojam vairāk nekā 20 gadu garumā un tur vienmēr ieraugām kādas labas pārmaiņas. Čiekurkalniešiem izdodas pacelties kādu pēdu virs zemes - gan Vinnija Pūka gaisa balonā, gan uz brāļu Irbīšu spārniem.

programme.title: Personas kods
programme.desc: Žurnālistes Baibas Šmites vadītais portretraidījums "Personas kods" ielūkojas arhīva materiālos, sarunājoties ar mūsu laikabiedriem par viņu attieksmi pret sabiedrības virmojumiem vakar, šodien, rīt. Projekta idejas autors – Rolands Tjarve.

programme.title: Gladiators: Warriors of the Ancient World
programme.desc: Emperor Commodus shocks Rome by casting aside tradition and becoming a gladiator. Over 14 days of extravagant games, he slays wild beasts, spars with helpless opponents, and indulges his fantasy of godhood - dressed as Hercules, demanding adoration. Behind the spectacle lies growing discontent: the Senate scorned, the treasury drained, and power abused, as he trains as a gladiator in his country estate. When Commodus plans to inaugurate the new year from the gladiators barracks, his inner circle panics. Poisoned by his mistress Marcia and strangled by his trainer Narcissus, Commodus dies; a far cry from the hero he imagined. His death sparks civil war, ushering in the Severan dynasty. His legacy is condemned, and Commodus remains one of the most bizarre figures in Roman history, an emperor who tried to rule from the arena, not the throne.

programme.title: Gladiators: Warriors of the Ancient World
programme.desc: In the later Roman Empire it was gladiators and emperors alike frequently came from overseas. Emperor Septimius Severus was born in Africa and his wife in Syria, as was a gladiator named Flamma who was captured and sent to fight in Sicily. There, in the ludus, he fights alongside fellow gladiators such as Delicatus, forging bonds that define his career. His epitaph records 34 fights: 21 victories, 9 draws, and only 4 defeats. After his final bout, he dies at the age of 30. His gravestone exposes not only the brutal realities of gladiatorial life but also the comradeship and loyalty of the gladiators. Flammas story embodies the grandeur, violence, and complexity of Romes obsession with bloodsport.

programme.title: Inside Incredible Machines
programme.desc: For forty years, Nimitz class aircraft carriers have delivered US military might wherever it is needed, anywhere on the globe. But now, this legendary design is being phased out and new carriers are planned. But until theyre ready, the giant Nimitz ships have to be kept at the forefront of military technology. In this episode, engineer and host Chad Zdenek spends a week on board the USS Carl Vinson to work with the highly trained specialist engineers, mechanics and sailors who keep this incredible floating city in perfect working order during a critical mission in the Pacific - training twenty F18 pilots who have never taken off from an Aircraft Carrier before. This gives Chad the chance to discover the five engineering innovations at the heart of Americas most incredible Aircraft Carrier.

programme.title: Inside Incredible Machines
programme.desc: For forty years, Nimitz class aircraft carriers have delivered US military might wherever it is needed, anywhere on the globe. But now, this legendary design is being phased out and new carriers are planned. But until theyre ready, the giant Nimitz ships have to be kept at the forefront of military technology. In this episode, engineer and host Chad Zdenek spends a week on board the USS Carl Vinson to work with the highly trained specialist engineers, mechanics and sailors who keep this incredible floating city in perfect working order during a critical mission in the Pacific - training twenty F18 pilots who have never taken off from an Aircraft Carrier before. This gives Chad the chance to discover the five engineering innovations at the heart of Americas most incredible Aircraft Carrier.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: AMO agents in Puerto Rico and a marine unit in St. Thomas partner to capture a fleeing boat and recover the $2.5 million worth of cocaine the smugglers dumped overboard before being apprehended. Meanwhile, CBP officers in El Paso discover a car loaded with over $211,000 of meth after a fender bender in a primary lane. In Miami, CBP officers screen for individuals carrying illicit party drugs into the United States.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And whats the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Air traffic controllers hear an explosion when Air Algerie Flight 6289 lifts off from a remote desert airport. And moments later, the Boeing 737-200 crashes in the Sahara. An intense fire ravages the fuselage, instantly killing all but one of the 103 people on board. For an international team of investigators, its clear the left engine exploded after liftoff—and that a fatigue crack eventually explains why. Whats less obvious is why the highly-experienced crew of the state-owned national carrier was unable to keep their aircraft in the sky. Single-engine failures are infinitely survivable, and the pilots should have been able to recover by working together. Investigators ultimately find their answer in the CVR and in a toxic tug-of-war between a belligerent captain working at cross purposes with Algerias first-ever female airline pilot.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Minutes before the noise curfew, a privately chartered Gulfstream III is on final approach to Aspen, Colorado amid heavy snow. And though the plane directly ahead aborts its landing due to poor visibility, AvJet N303GA emerges from the clouds, tries to line up with the single runway, and crashes—instantly claiming the lives of all 18 people on board. With no signs of mechanical failure, investigators learn the plane dropped well below minimum altitude on approach. And though a deep dive into the pilots backgrounds reveals no red flags, the planes wreckless trajectory begins to make sense when they look into what happened before the late takeoff from Los Angeles. Client pressure blurred the lines between safety and customer satisfaction. And as a result, the confused pilots were determined to land the plane at Aspen—in spite of the risks. Final

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyones favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyones favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: At the worlds busiest international hub Customs Officer Hassan catches a smuggler hiding 2,000 tiny bottles of illegal prescription medication. Ground Dispatcher Nizel races to prepare a cash shipment of twenty million dollars destined for Londons Heathrow Airport. And Project Delivery Manager Myles is facing a make or break final inspection of the airports new Concourse D by one of the most powerful men in Dubai, the owner of Dubai Airports, His Royal Highness Sheikh Ahmed Al Maktoum.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: Dubai International is in the global race to be the worlds biggest airport. A massive new concourse for the worlds largest fleet of A380s uses over a 150 million man-hours and 930 thousand cubic meters of concrete. Unafraid of new challenges, the airport was the first ever to close two runways back to back for construction. In the words of its Engineering CEO, "the bar is getting higher and higher." There is no room for failure in Dubai.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car SOS is back for a sixth series with parts blagging petrolhead Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend breathing life into classic cars for unsuspecting owners. This series yet another array of iconic cars including a 1990s Lancia Delta Integrale, a 60s Citroen DS, an 80s Peugeot 205 Rally car and a 1950s MGA. Special guests this series include actor James Nesbitt and Monte Carlo legend Paddy Hopkirk.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car SOS is back for a sixth series with parts blagging petrolhead Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend breathing life into classic cars for unsuspecting owners. This series yet another array of iconic cars including a 1990s Lancia Delta Integrale, a 60s Citroen DS, an 80s Peugeot 205 Rally car and a 1950s MGA. Special guests this series include actor James Nesbitt and Monte Carlo legend Paddy Hopkirk.

programme.title: Megafactories
programme.desc: Ultimate Factories also known as Megafactories is an American documentary television series that premiered in 2006 on the National Geographic Channel. The program explores the inner workings of factories worldwide. Each episode profiles the machinery and manpower behind each factorys main product, featuring close-ups, breakdowns, interviews, and side stories to show the sequence of events to produce the product in the factory. Hoff Productions was one of the principal producers of this highly successful series. It also airs in non-US markets as Megafactories.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: In Miami, HSI executes a controlled delivery of 142 kilograms of cocaine worth $7.25 million, found in a shipment of avocados. CBP works with Border Patrol, Air and Marine Operations, and HSI to pursue human smuggling leads on the Texas border, culminating in the discovery of a human stash house holding 16 migrants. Meanwhile, CBP officers at JFK discover a man smuggling generic Viagra worth $40,000.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: Was the tragedy of the space shuttle Columbia baked into the original design? A wave of ship strikes has Chinas bridge builders working overtime. Temporary stages are easy to put up and easy to take down, but sometimes they come down at the wrong time: suddenly and all at once. Check out hotels that tumble; take a tour of some of the worlds most expensive and useless airports, and learn why a Shanghai apartment tower dropped like a slab.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: Lightning bolts cause construction mayhem whenever they strike buildings. All over the world, cities are sinking for very different reasons, and cooling towers are collapsing. A Mexico City metro train and many bridges in India all fall down. While in Dallas, an unlucky demolition becomes a cousin of the Leaning Tower of Pisa and a social media sensation. Regular people show off their MacGyver skills prompting the question: genius or harebrained?

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: An Italian supermarket under construction drastically collapsesy. Amusement parks become a lot less amusing when fires break out; Indias tunnel workers are trapped in a catastrophic collapse; Canadas light rail fails over and over again; and a stadium loses its lid to a hurricane. Plus, theres a look at how home constructions been misled by lead.

programme.title: Airport Security: Brazil
programme.desc: Federal Police at Sao Paolo International Airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. Their main threat: cocaine smuggling. Police arrest a woman carrying a load of small purses packed cocaine, but she claims shes innocent. When the agents bring in her boyfriend, she erupts in anger. Agents uncover 3 kilos of cocaine disguised as bleaching powder. A woman hides cocaine in her undergarments, but she may be carrying more elsewhere.

programme.title: Airport Security: Brazil
programme.desc: Federal Police at Sao Paulo International Airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. Their main threat, cocaine smuggling. Agents arrest two different carriers on a flight to Ethiopia. One has cocaine in shampoo bottles; the other, in fabric dye containers. Intel flags a man heading to Hong Kong. He has capsules taped to his body - and possibly other places as well. A woman has two empty backpacks in her suitcase, and both hide cocaine.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: US Air Flight #1493 (Boeing 737-300) and Skywest Flight #5569 (Fairchild Metroliner) February 1st, 1991 Its a busy night at Los Angeles International Airport, and US Air Flight #1493 is on its final approach. The pilots configure the 737 for landing and although they repeatedly radio the tower for instructions, their calls go unanswered. They finally get clearance just moments before landing, but within seconds of touching down, the aircraft erupts in flames and crashes into an abandoned building. Rescue workers rush to the scene, and as survivors emerge from the inferno, firefighters make a horrifying discovery... Can investigators determine what went wrong?

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: King Herod is reviled as one of the most evil characters in the Bible, responsible for the horrific "massacre of the innocents" in his efforts to kill the infant Jesus Christ. But later historians coin him "Herod the Great." Now, immersive CGI and new archaeological discoveries—on land and deep underwater—reveal the truth about this Biblical villain.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: The Bibles famous Tower of Babel, so tall it reached the heavens, exceeded all modern engineering wonders. We follow a season of excavations to discover if such a tower ever existed. Teams dig deep to reveal magnificent ancient monuments across Iraq and take to the skies to search Babylon for answers. New discoveries and immersive CGI shed light on the world in which this Bible story was written.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Tropical Takedown
programme.desc: Homeland Security Investigations Puerto Rico arrest 37 members of a smuggling network responsible for multiple murders, and the import and export of cocaine on the island. Air and Marine operations agents in Mayaguez chase after a loaded vessel with $5.4 million in cocaine onboard. AMO agents in Fajardo investigate a party boat and discover a passenger on board entered the country illegally.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Tropical Takedown
programme.desc: Homeland Security Investigations arrest multiple suspects across Puerto Rico involved in a drug smuggling ring linked to multiple murders. Air and Marine Operations agents in Fajardo seize$13.2 million worth of cocaine from an overturned vessel, while AMO agents in the U.S. Virgin Islands conduct a night operation to intercept smuggling vessels moving between the USVI and British Virgin Islands.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Two major agencies at John F. Kennedy International Airport work together to limit the amount of illegal goods and drugs coming into the country. Collaboration is key in keeping American soil safe and clear of drugs. When Customs and Border Protection officers stop a young drug smuggler with cocaine in his luggage, is it up to the Special agents of Homeland Security Investigations to take the case further. Once the smuggler names name, its up to both teams to track down the other suspected drug smugglers and get to the source. At the end of the day, these officers prevail and successfully keep a half of a kilo of cocaine off the streets. But thats just another day at JFK.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Flights from all around the world arrive at JFK International Airport every year, transporting about forty six million passengers a year. U.S. Customs and Border Protection officers and Homeland Security Investigations special agents are on high alert teaming up to stop it. Whether its intercepting a family with heroin in their luggage or determining whats setting off radiation alarms, these officers are ready for the challenge.

programme.title: Airport Security: Peru
programme.desc: Security teams at Lima, Perus airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. The biggest threat: cocaine smuggling. A couple is caught carrying cocaine in bottled beverages. And the girlfriend may have been in the dark about the entire scheme. Cocaine is uncovered, disguised as packaged food. And this may not be the carriers first job. Police discover cocaine sewn into panels of an insulated jacket and that could be just the beginning.

programme.title: Airport Security: Peru
programme.desc: Security teams at Lima, Perus airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. The biggest threat: cocaine smuggling. Two Ukrainian passengers are caught with cocaine. And one may have tricked the other. Police will need a translator to sort it out. A couple celebrating their anniversary may be taking home more than just memories. Customs find more than 130,000 euros hidden in the carry-on of an arriving passenger and move in to investigate.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: King Herod is reviled as one of the most evil characters in the Bible, responsible for the horrific "massacre of the innocents" in his efforts to kill the infant Jesus Christ. But later historians coin him "Herod the Great." Now, immersive CGI and new archaeological discoveries—on land and deep underwater—reveal the truth about this Biblical villain.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: The Bibles famous Tower of Babel, so tall it reached the heavens, exceeded all modern engineering wonders. We follow a season of excavations to discover if such a tower ever existed. Teams dig deep to reveal magnificent ancient monuments across Iraq and take to the skies to search Babylon for answers. New discoveries and immersive CGI shed light on the world in which this Bible story was written.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car SOS is back for a sixth series with parts blagging petrolhead Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend breathing life into classic cars for unsuspecting owners. This series yet another array of iconic cars including a 1990s Lancia Delta Integrale, a 60s Citroen DS, an 80s Peugeot 205 Rally car and a 1950s MGA. Special guests this series include actor James Nesbitt and Monte Carlo legend Paddy Hopkirk.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car SOS is back for a sixth series with parts blagging petrolhead Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend breathing life into classic cars for unsuspecting owners. This series yet another array of iconic cars including a 1990s Lancia Delta Integrale, a 60s Citroen DS, an 80s Peugeot 205 Rally car and a 1950s MGA. Special guests this series include actor James Nesbitt and Monte Carlo legend Paddy Hopkirk.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: In Miami, HSI executes a controlled delivery of 142 kilograms of cocaine worth $7.25 million, found in a shipment of avocados. CBP works with Border Patrol, Air and Marine Operations, and HSI to pursue human smuggling leads on the Texas border, culminating in the discovery of a human stash house holding 16 migrants. Meanwhile, CBP officers at JFK discover a man smuggling generic Viagra worth $40,000.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And whats the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: US Air Flight #1493 (Boeing 737-300) and Skywest Flight #5569 (Fairchild Metroliner) February 1st, 1991 Its a busy night at Los Angeles International Airport, and US Air Flight #1493 is on its final approach. The pilots configure the 737 for landing and although they repeatedly radio the tower for instructions, their calls go unanswered. They finally get clearance just moments before landing, but within seconds of touching down, the aircraft erupts in flames and crashes into an abandoned building. Rescue workers rush to the scene, and as survivors emerge from the inferno, firefighters make a horrifying discovery... Can investigators determine what went wrong?

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyones favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyones favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: The latest sonar technology reveals shipwrecks as never seen before. As water and land drain away: a secret beneath Manhattans skyline, an earth-shattering feat of engineering, a record-breaking icon and a casualty of WWI stealth warfare. Examining these hidden giants can explain New York Citys meteoric rise to bustling world metropolis. A city that cant be kept down, forever pushing forward, with true grit and determination.

programme.title: Inside the Ring
programme.desc: Inside the "Ring is the extraordinary tale of how a few country racers" the quest for speed gave rise to a world famous grand prix racing circuit, and ultimately, how the Ring Nurburgring found new life as the ultimate automotive testing venue in the world. This is the inside story of how automotive manufacturers push modern machines to the very limits of physics and a key to understanding mankinds relentless quest to push it harder, go faster and brake later in the endless evolution of the automobile. With unprecedented access, we uncover what happens behind the normally locked doors of the latest top-secret state-of-the-art facility for the newest kid on the block - Hyundai - And follow the testing and development behind their high-performance N divisions all new cutting-edge machine.

programme.title: Inside Sydney Airport
programme.desc: Lightning has struck an incoming international flight. Engineers assess the damage, as passengers become increasingly impatient. High winds lead to runway closures, adding pressure to flight schedules. Another plane arrives with potentially dangerous liquid leaking from its cargo. 3 ground crew who came in contact are quarantined until fire services can identify the liquid.

programme.title: Inside Sydney Airport
programme.desc: Operating under a noise curfew between 0600-2300 hours, the pressure is on at Sydney Airport to complete 900 plane movements in a day. Duty Manager George is confronted by a suspicious package. Meanwhile Rookie Mel suddenly has 2 medical emergencies in the space of an hour. And a freight handling crew have a problem with loading a bulging cargo pod.

programme.title: Inside Melbourne Airport
programme.desc: At Australias busiest airport which operates 24/7, a blackout halts operations and Resource Coordinator Andrew tries to restore power within an hour. Air Traffic Controller Melissa manages up to 700 daily plane movements. A flight must dump fuel and return to the airport after take-off due to a faulty engine warning.

programme.title: Inside Melbourne Airport
programme.desc: Brad and the ground services team have just 90 minutes to turn around an Air India flight for take-off. A kangaroo in the car park keeps ground transport manager Trent on his toes. Environment officer Dave discovers illegal bee hives within the airport precinct, and baggage handler Brodie battles carousel jams.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Travelers are reunited with lost treasures, including an expensive pair of vintage Air Jordans, sweaty boxing gear, and a beloved stuffed animal. In Tampa, the K9 unit is called in to ensure an abandoned bag does not contain explosives, and in Norfolk, the airports auction of lost items, including a van converted into a mobile barber shop, raises nearly $55,000.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost and Found
programme.desc: A lone diamond from grandmas ring is lost at Pittsburghs airport by a young bride. Lost-and-found workers at Tampa International desperately try to find the owner of a fanny pack as it contains much-needed medication and $3,000 in cash. Travelers to a comic convention in Salt Lake City leave behind peculiar objects, including unique fan art acquired at the site.

programme.title: Engineering Europe
programme.desc: The UKs engineering wonders revealed: including innovative electric flying machines, ingenious skyscrapers, the secrets of Londons Tower Bridge, a 57 billion pound railway and a mega-stadium with a surprising historical twist.

programme.title: Engineering Europe
programme.desc: Explore the engineering wonders of Europes northernmost region, from Icelands epic lava-defying barriers to Finlands record-breaking vertical factory. This spectacular journey uncovers the Nordics boldest builds including the construction of the worlds largest wooden city and a Swedish ferry that doesnt just sail—it flies.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: September 1, 1983 Korean Air Lines Flight #007 is high above the Sea of Japan with 269 people on board. Hoping to save fuel during the last leg of its marathon flight from New York to Seoul, it requests permission to fly at a higher altitude. When the aircraft reaches its new altitude, however, it is rocked by rapid decompression, spirals out of control and crashes into the sea. An international controversy erupts, and within days, Soviet officials admit to shooting down the passenger plane. With Cold War tensions at an all-time high, its up to international investigators to keep two superpowers at bay. But can they prevent an all-out armed conflict, and can they determine what went wrong?

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: March 10th, 1989 Bound for Winnipeg, Air Ontario Flight #1363 prepares for takeoff after a brief layover at a remote Northern airport. Already an hour behind schedule, the pilots fear the heavy snowfall will further delay their departure, and after refueling, they taxi into position and accelerate. The jet reaches takeoff speed but struggles to get airborne, and although it clears the trees at the end of the runway, starts shaking violently and less than a minute later crashes into the woods. It takes months for investigators to determine what went wrong. And tragically, their findings come too late to prevent an icy killer from striking again.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: Noah and the Great Flood is one of the Bibles best-known tales. Now, investigators seek to unravel the storys origins, which may predate the Old Testament. They explore some of the earliest cities in Mesopotamia, use the latest science to examine past climates, decipher clay tablets, and put an ancient blueprint of the Ark to the test. Immersive CGI brings this long-lost story to life.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: The story of Exodus is one of the great biblical tales, but why does ancient Egypt play such a central role? We follow a new season of excavations to find answers. Teams brush away layers of earth to reveal a magnificent lost palace and decipher reliefs from the temple of one of Egypts greatest pharaohs. New discoveries shed light on the period in which this biblical story was set.

programme.title: Europe from Above
programme.desc: Europe from Above takes to the air over Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Poland, Spain and the UK to showcase Europes finest cultural and geographical landmarks as youve never seen them before. Stunning aerial hyper-lapse photography allows us to visualise the changes of a season in seconds, as tulip fields in the Netherlands magically burst into colour and waterfalls in the Dolomites turn to ice. We reveal how tradition, engineering and natural wonders have shaped this epic continent - a vibrant portrait of these regions and the people who keep their traditions alive.

programme.title: Europe from Above
programme.desc: Europe from Above takes to the air over Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Poland, Spain and the UK to showcase Europes finest cultural and geographical landmarks as youve never seen them before. Stunning aerial hyper-lapse photography allows us to visualise the changes of a season in seconds, as tulip fields in the Netherlands magically burst into colour and waterfalls in the Dolomites turn to ice. We reveal how tradition, engineering and natural wonders have shaped this epic continent - a vibrant portrait of these regions and the people who keep their traditions alive.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Minutes before the noise curfew, a privately chartered Gulfstream III is on final approach to Aspen, Colorado amid heavy snow. And though the plane directly ahead aborts its landing due to poor visibility, AvJet N303GA emerges from the clouds, tries to line up with the single runway, and crashes—instantly claiming the lives of all 18 people on board. With no signs of mechanical failure, investigators learn the plane dropped well below minimum altitude on approach. And though a deep dive into the pilots backgrounds reveals no red flags, the planes wreckless trajectory begins to make sense when they look into what happened before the late takeoff from Los Angeles. Client pressure blurred the lines between safety and customer satisfaction. And as a result, the confused pilots were determined to land the plane at Aspen—in spite of the risks. Final

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Just minutes after taking off from Lima, the crew of Aeroperú Flight 603 is overwhelmed by a series of conflicting error messages. Flying blind through thick clouds—and unable to confirm either airspeed or altitude—the pilots dont know which alarm they can trust. A controller steps in and dispatches a rescue plane to guide them back to the airport, but help doesnt arrive in time. And just as the crew is troubleshooting over open ocean, the Boeing 757 plunges into the Pacific, instantly killing everyone on board. A Navy expedition to the sea floor proves the plane was intact when it hit the water and successfully retrieves the planes black boxes. A single image of the wreckage reveals a minor maintenance glitch with deadly repercussions, while the flight data reveals the crew was ill-prepared for a fatal cascade of erroneous data.

programme.title: Toronto Airport Uncovered
programme.desc: Fire crews race to a plane with faulty brakes, cargo vanishes, and passengers refuse to check bags. Wildlife teams deploy eagles and pyrotechnics to clear the runways, while mechanics battle to keep aircraft flight-ready. As problems unfold behind the scenes at Toronto International Airport, multiple teams fight to keep flights on schedule.

programme.title: Toronto Airport Uncovered
programme.desc: At Toronto Pearson International Airport, the sub-zero temperatures push the largest de-icing station in the world to its limits, as snow and freezing ice delay take offs. On the apron, its a race to free up frozen cargo doors and water pipes. And the team have their hands full with an injured flight attendant, irate passengers and a trespasser in one of the most dangerous areas of the airport.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: Noah and the Great Flood is one of the Bibles best-known tales. Now, investigators seek to unravel the storys origins, which may predate the Old Testament. programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: On the lands of their ancestors, Alaska Natives carry on tradition in a rapidly changing environment. Jody Potts-Joseph relies on the land to provide food, water, and warmth for her family. The Apassingnok family take any opportunity to gather food from the Bering Sea. Joel Jacko builds a cache to protect his winter food supply from the bears his family lives among. And Marvin Agnot relies on the tides to gather food for the people of his remote village.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: In Alaska, Native peoples have long secured resources from the land and sea for their survival. The Apassingoks take to the Bering Sea in search of marine animals to feed their village. Jody Potts-Joseph and her son Denali traverse the mountains on the hunt for caribou. The Jackos teach their daughter her first lessons in hunting. And Marvin Agnot takes his nephew Glyn on a hunt for ptarmigan.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: September 1, 1983 Korean Air Lines Flight #007 is high above the Sea of Japan with 269 people on board. Hoping to save fuel during the last leg of its marathon flight from New York to Seoul, it requests permission to fly at a higher altitude. When the aircraft reaches its new altitude, however, it is rocked by rapid decompression, spirals out of control and crashes into the sea. An international controversy erupts, and within days, Soviet officials admit to shooting down the passenger plane. With Cold War tensions at an all-time high, its up to international investigators to keep two superpowers at bay. programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: Three mysterious accidents send investigators hunting for clues. In the end, all three trails lead back to the same source-the fuel tank. Minutes before touching down in Portland, United Airlines 173 loses all four engines over a densely populated suburb. In Japan, a Boeing 737 lands safely, but then catches fire with all 165 passengers and crew still on board. And, nearly 700 miles off course, the crew of Varig Flight 254 are forced to make a crash landing in the Amazon jungle.

programme.title: Heartland Docs
programme.desc: Youve Gotta Be Kitten Me!. Drs. Ben and Erin Schroeder deal with a couple of critical cases in the clinic. First, they perform an emergency c-section on a cat that has been in labor for two days, and a horse with a wounded leg requires some creative care.

programme.title: Winter of the Bear
programme.desc: In the forests of northern Finland, survival is a race against the seasons. For a mother brown bear, life between winters is a relentless battle as a single mother. She wakes from hibernation, thin and weary, to guide cubs through a fleeting summer. They need food, and shell teach them everything, not least of all, avoiding dangerous males during mating season and facing wolves in a deadly fight for food. Every day counts in these forests. When winter returns, only the strong and the wise will endure this wild, unforgiving land.

programme.title: Wild Hunters
programme.desc: Embark on a spectacular journey around the world in search of natures deadliest predators. See how mammals, insects, fish, and birds fight for survival using a fascinating combination of hunting strategies.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: A forensic look at how polar bears hunt prey, offering new perspectives on the tactics they use to track.

programme.title: Heartland Docs
programme.desc: Dinner and a Moo-Vie. The vets visit a sick cat at an antique store which leads to some vintage finds. They also treat a hawk with a life-threatening injury and then hit the trail after performing dental work on a group of horses.

programme.title: Winter of the Bear

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Phil Breslin, third generation Indigenous educator, biologist and adventurer is on a quest to reveal some of the strangest and most specialised animal adaptations on the planet. Focusing on Australias incredibly varied landscapes and environments, Phil yarns with First Nations people about habitats, traverses deserts, dives in the oceans depths and uses science to identify Australias ultimate animal survivors.

programme.title: Predator Bloodlines
programme.desc: She overthrew the preceding ruler of North Clan in an unprecedented take-over. She is both a ruthless battle commander, leading her clan in warfare against rivals and a devoted guardian to her clan and parent to her offspring.

programme.title: Big Cat Games
programme.desc: The worlds most ferocious land predators are pitted against each other in a series of challenges that push them to their limits.

programme.title: Wild Hunters
programme.desc: Embark on a spectacular journey around the world in search of natures deadliest predators. See how mammals, insects, fish, and birds fight for survival using a fascinating combination of hunting strategies.

programme.title: When Sharks Attack
programme.desc: From Americas coastline to exotic beaches around the world, shark attacks are turning dream vacations into nightmares. Many of these attacks occur suddenly, in large numbers, and in unexpected locations - puzzling locals and scientists alike. Nat Geo WILD investigates these mysterious incidents, to discover what is affecting some of natures most feared fish.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Are Ewe Pregnant?. The Pols are preparing for sheep to give birth, which means figuring out how to catch and shear their four Merino ewes - no small task as this is new territory for everyone except Dr. Pol.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pol Shebang. Its been a year of farming for the Pol family. Even with Charles recovering from his injury, the farms showing no signs of slowing down! Beth takes the next step with her bees to grow the colony and harvest honey.

programme.title: Wild Hunters
programme.desc: Eagles And Hawks. Few hunters in nature boast the power and majesty of birds of prey. Hunting defines the very quintessence of their bodies and their senses. No other hunters possess such powerful eyesight, such effective talons or their speed.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds assembles "The Superzeros," a team of somewhat pitiful animals with unexpectedly awesome superpowers. Forget about the cheetahs speed and the eagles eyesight; and say hello to the invisible glass frog, the indestructible honey badger and the might of the pistol shrimp who can fire bubbles hotter than the sun.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds reveals some highly questionable parenting strategies from the animal kingdoms worst parents, the underdogs. From a goose who lays their eggs on the top of a cliff to a koala that feeds its baby poop, its uncertain if they bad parents or just misunderstood. But no matter how bad one thinks they may be at parenting; they cant be as bad as these guys.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Forget the birds and the bees, Ryan reveals the steps to finding "the one," underdog style. From first attraction in giant-nosed proboscis monkeys to the importance of wingmen in turkey courtship or even foreplay with flying foxes, these animals are rewriting the rule book on messy and complicated relationships in the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds highlights natures cleverest tricksters.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: Mashatu: Land of Leopards
programme.desc: In Botswanas Mashatu Game Reserve, one of the last sanctuaries for free-roaming leopards, a mother gives birth to two cubs. Shell stop at nothing to protect them. But as climate change tightens its grip, resources dwindle, and a fierce leopard war looms. Over three years of intimate observation, this film unveils rare, breathtaking footage of behaviors never before documented, offering an unprecedented glimpse into the resilience and secrets of this elusive species.

Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds assembles "The Superzeros," a team of somewhat pitiful animals with unexpectedly awesome superpowers. Forget about the cheetahs speed and the eagles eyesight; and say hello to the invisible glass frog, the indestructible honey badger and the might of the pistol shrimp who can fire bubbles hotter than the sun.

programme.title: Mashatu: Land of Leopards
programme.desc: In Botswanas Mashatu Game Reserve, one of the last sanctuaries for free-roaming leopards, a mother gives birth to two cubs. Shell stop at nothing to protect them. But as climate change tightens its grip, resources dwindle, and a fierce leopard war looms. Over three years of intimate observation, this film unveils rare, breathtaking footage of behaviors never before documented, offering an unprecedented glimpse into the resilience and secrets of this elusive species.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Total Grossout. Ryan shares the underdogs with the most disgusting solutions, from slimy snot traps to butthole safe rooms, helping them win the game of life.

programme.title: Wild Hunters
programme.desc: Embark on a spectacular journey around the world in search of natures deadliest predators. See how mammals, insects, fish, and birds fight for survival using a fascinating combination of hunting strategies.

programme.title: Wild Hunters
programme.desc: Eagles And Hawks. Few hunters in nature boast the power and majesty of birds of prey. Hunting defines the very quintessence of their bodies and their senses. No other hunters possess such powerful eyesight, such effective talons or their speed.

programme.title: Wild Hunters
programme.desc: Embark on a spectacular journey around the world in search of natures deadliest predators. See how mammals, insects, fish, and birds fight for survival using a fascinating combination of hunting strategies.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds highlights natures cleverest tricksters.

programme.title: Wild Hunters
programme.desc: Eagles And Hawks. Few hunters in nature boast the power and majesty of birds of prey. Hunting defines the very quintessence of their bodies and their senses. No other hunters possess such powerful eyesight, such effective talons or their speed.

programme.title: Predator Bloodlines
programme.desc: She overthrew the preceding ruler of North Clan in an unprecedented take-over. She is both a ruthless battle commander, leading her clan in warfare against rivals and a devoted guardian to her clan and parent to her offspring.

programme.title: Big Cat Games
programme.desc: The worlds most ferocious land predators are pitted against each other in a series of challenges that push them to their limits.

programme.title: Wild Hunters: Deadly Killers of Africa
programme.desc: Journey across Africa exploring the continents most iconic and deadliest predators. These African stories are a show of raw power, strength and endurance. An awe-inspiring display of the fierce, everyday battles fought in the wild.

programme.title: Trials of the Wild
programme.desc: Watch a range of wild animals trying to survive in the wilderness as they migrate, hunt and defend themselves against predators and the dangers that are living alongside them. Follow animals born to fight to those designed to live in the canopy of trees as the series gives you an insight into natures greatest spectacles from around the world on land, water and air. This nature documentary is intriguing and engaging as they examine a range of species and how they survive in the most brutal environments.

programme.title: Trials of the Wild
programme.desc: Watch a range of wild animals trying to survive in the wilderness as they migrate, hunt and defend themselves against predators and the dangers that are living alongside them. Follow animals born to fight to those designed to live in the canopy of trees as the series gives you an insight into natures greatest spectacles from around the world on land, water and air. This nature documentary is intriguing and engaging as they examine a range of species and how they survive in the most brutal environments.

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Killer Three
programme.desc: This series looks at the natural born killers of the animal kingdom with each episode focusing on a particular, shared aspect of what makes these creatures successful predators. In Little Killers, we see how a lack of physical size can be overcome when hunting prey and miniscule attackers are able to bring down prey that are massive in comparison. In Speed Kills, the spotlight is shone on those predators who use their incredibly fast skills to catch their food. From the fastest animal on land, the cheetah, to the stargazer fish that dispatches its prey in a tenth of a second to the deadly black mamba, some of these attacks are so fast that they cannot be captured using slow-motion. In Hunger Games, the emphasis is placed on the driving force behind the majority of attacks, the desire for food.

programme.title: Wild, Smart and Deadly
programme.desc: Deception. From tigers who hunt using their fur as camouflage and a spider who mimics an ant to sneak into a colony to a bird that uses false alarm calls to trick meerkats into giving up their prey, nature deploys remarkable deception to survive.

programme.title: Wild Hunters: Deadly Killers of Africa
programme.desc: Journey across Africa exploring the continents most iconic and deadliest predators. These African stories are a show of raw power, strength and endurance. An awe-inspiring display of the fierce, everyday battles fought in the wild.

programme.title: Wild, Smart and Deadly
programme.desc: In the wild, animals face life or death battles every day, from escaping deadly predators to fighting off fierce rivals. Sometimes brute force isnt enough to prevail. Survival can depend on death-defying acrobatics, secret senses and hidden weapons - the extraordinary superpowers that help animals survive.

programme.title: Wild, Smart and Deadly
programme.desc: In nature, the prevailing rule is "eat or be eaten." Avoiding predators and competition for space, food, and mates is a priority for every animal. But before you can attack, you need to be able to defend yourself. After eons of evolution, animals have developed powerful and surprising defensive techniques that help them avoid, overcome, or escape challengers.

programme.title: Wild Hunters: Deadly Killers of Africa
programme.desc: Journey across Africa exploring the continents most iconic and deadliest predators. These African stories are a show of raw power, strength and endurance. An awe-inspiring display of the fierce, everyday battles fought in the wild.

programme.title: Killer Animal Tactics
programme.desc: From top predators to clever creatures, these killers are some of the most armed and dangerous animals in the world. In order to survive, they use some of the scariest strategies and lethal weapons like ambush, camouflage, claws and paws,pack hunting and more to take down prey. The name of the game is kill or be killed!

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Killer Three

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Killer Three
programme.desc: The animal world is full of predators who can kill in the blink of an eye. These are the Worlds Deadliest: Speed Kills -- and they dish out death like fast food. From the fleet-footed cheetah, to the stargazer fish that swallows prey in a tenth of a second, to the venomous black mamba -- the fastest and deadliest snake in the world -- Speed Kills puts you in the line of fire to show you the insane speeds at which some creatures kill. Youll witness animal death strikes so fast, they cant even be captured in slow motion.

programme.title: Built for the Kill
programme.desc: Discover some of the most dangerous and deadly animal species on the planet, from big cats to tiny insects. These creatures developed amazing skills to survive and kill their pray in unique ways. programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni domā, ka ēdiens spēj likt tiem mainīt krāsu un formu, tāpēc izlemj atrast katram piemēroto ēdienu. Barbabo nav iedvesmas, tāpēc vairs nespēj radīt. Visa ģimene palīdz, iesakot jaunas zīmējumu tēmas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Vecākus pārsteidz aizvien vairāku reklāmas izkārtņu parādīšanās gar viņu ceļu. Gaisma no reklāmām ir tik spoža, ka naktī vairs nevar saskatīt zvaigznes un visur ir tik daudz stabu! Pietiks! Ģimenei jārīkojas! // Barbalala vēlas kļūt par kovbojmeiteni un Barbazū ir apņēmies viņai palīdzēt. Lai to panāktu, viņai jāiemācās aprūpēt govis un bulli. Tas nav viegli, bet, ja viņa pacentīsies, viņa būs lieliska kovbojmeitene.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbalala un ģimenes dzīve!

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabla komanda strādā, lai pārvērstu Celtnieklīča pludmales promenādi spožā, svinīgā ziemas brīnumzemē. Kad sniegota diena izjauc Motores un Miksas Virpuļvāveres plānus, Rabla komanda dara to, ko prot vislabāk... būvē.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Celtnieklīcī tiek uzbūvēta pirmā viesnīca, kad ciemos atbrauc fermeres Zojas brālēns Hedlijs. Kad juceklis uz dabas takas apmulsina visus Dakija Dū kunga dzimšanas dienas ballītes viesus, ķepaiņi viņiem palīdz atrast ceļu.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Celtnieklīcis gaida iemīļotas TV zvaigznes jauno filmu. Bet vispirms vajadzīgs kinoteātris, kur to skatīties!

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Bērni pirmoreiz brauks ar vilcienu un nakšņos viesnīcā. Mamma būs ar viņiem, bet tētis atsevišķi vedīs paštaisītos izstrādājumus. Viņiem jāpārdod savi darbiņi ikgadējā lielajā tirdziņā, ja tētis paspēs laicīgi... // Uzsniga sniegs un bērni sarīkoja pikošanos, bet Barbabo uzcēla lielisku sniegavīru. Bet kā lai viņu saglabā, kad paliks siltāks? Sākas sacensības ar laiku...

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Daži dzīvnieki ir biedējoši un šķiet bīstami. Tētis stāsta savu piedzīvojumu, kad viņš ar Lolitu kāpa kalnos un satika vilku. // Rīt ir bērnu pirmā skolas diena, katrs gatavojas citādāk. Pirmā skolas diena ir satraucoša, tik daudz par ko jāpadomā.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tomijs piedalās raķešu sacīkstēs, Tims atbalsta savu brāli. Tims novērš Tijas domas no Taskija, kamēr tas mazgājas veļas mašīnā. Bērni kļūst par vecākiem, un vecāki - par bērniem.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad projektam vajadzīga palīdzība, kucēnus apciemo Skaja no Piedzīvojumu līča. Iejaucas Ātrmeistars, un Skajai ar Rabla komandu jāpieliek visi spēki, lai glābtu situāciju.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Mēre Greitveja komandai lūdz uzbūvēt ko īpašu draugam Dakijam Dū. Taču notiek mistērija... Pirms sākas vētra un sarežģījumi ar cālēniem, kucēni fermerei Zojai steidz būvēt lietus ūdens savācēju.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora un Zābaciņš lūdz jauno lietus mākonīti Klaudiju piepildīt izžuvušu ūdens slidkalniņu. Zābaciņam piemetas astiņkute, kuru var izārstēt burvju vardīte - ja vien nopelnīs savas burvju svītras, palīdzot draugiem lietusmežā.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais uztvēris melodiju no Marsa. Barbapapas būvē raķeti, lai dotos uz sarkano planētu. Ceļā uz Marsu Barbapapas sastop Barbamarsiešu ģimeni. Viņiem nav laika iepazīties, kad ciemam uzbrūk milzu augs.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs, Tija un tētis netiek prom attāla asteroīda. Tims, Kaja un Tomijs cenšas dabūt laukā bumbu no mammas istabas. Tims cenšas dabūt lejā Tijas jauno balonu, kas ieķēries kokā.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Komanda uzbūvē staciju tieši laikā, lai sagaidītu fermeres Zojas jauno gotiņu. Uz Celtnieklīci pārvācas Sjerra Spīdošā. Taču, kad Rabla komanda taisās viņu sagaidīt, iejaucas Ātrmeistars.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Dullo vecāku" galvenais varonis ir desmit gadus vecs zēns Timijs, kurš dzīvo izdomātā pilsētā Dimsdeilā, un tur viņam neklājas viegli. Timija dzīve ir bēdīga, jo vecāki reti kad ir mājās, viņu pieskata Vikija, 16 gadus veca ļauna auklīte, viņš pastāvīgi tiek apsmiets, viņu moka arī skolotājs Krokera kungs. Bet viss mainās, kad viņam uzrodas divi laumiņu krustvecāki - Kosmo, viņa sieva Vanda un vēlāk - viņu dēls Pufs. Timijs apjauš, ka laumiņu krustvecāki noteiktās robežās spēj piepildīt visas viņa vēlēšanās. Tomēr Timijs vēl ir maziņš un reizēm ievēlas ko tādu, kas netīši noved pie nepatikšanām.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Jauni piedzīvojumi ar DORU! Pievienojies drošajai pasaules pētītājai Dorai un viņas labākajam draugam Zābaciņam viņu kopīgajos ceļojumos pa maģisko lietusmežu, kurā var notikt - un notiek - brīnumu lietas. Lets go!

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims un Kaja cīnās par Terijas rezerves biļeti uz Kosmoslendu.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tija un Tomijs rīko talantu šovu, bet nevar izlemt, kurš uzstāsies pirmais.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Kaja un Tomijs cenšas dabūt laukā bumbu no mammas istabas.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni pielipuši pie televizora, tāpēc vecāki mudina viņus veidot raidījumus. Barbapapas apmeklē evolūcijas muzeju. Programmā: Zemes radīšana, Pirmskembrija perioda zemūdene un... dinozauri!

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Katram bērnam ir jādemonstrē savs talants.

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Zobainais, mīlīgais Krokodila kungs kopā ar labāko draudzeni Deiziju bezbēdīgi lavierē pa dzīvi, kas pilna trakiem piedzīvojumiem un komiskiem pārpratumiem.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Mērei Greitvejai vajag daudz picas, un ātri! Bet, kad pieslēdzas Ātrmeistars, suņiem jānovērš viņa picas problēma. Kad ģimene pa Ātrmeistara ceļu nevar pagūt uz lidostu, Rabla komandai līdz izlidošanai jāuzbūvē jauns ceļš.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Ir Tanšu diena! Vai ķepaiņi paspēs uzbūvēt dāvanu tantei Celtnei?

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabravo noķer mistisku maskētu vandāli, kurš cenšas bēgt pēc mājas apzīmēšanas. Pie lietas ķeras detektīvs un doktors. // Barbabravo mīļākā mašīna pazūd no viesistabas. To meklējot Barbabravo, Barbabella un Barbagudrais zem dīvāna atrod dīvainu caurumu. Ja nu mašīna aizkrita līdz zemes centram?

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais rada putekļu sūkšanas robotu, kas lieliski spēlē futbolu. Barbabērni sarīko spēli pret robotiem.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs un Tija apmaldās izklaides centrā. Tims meklē jaunu, sev piemērotu raķeti. Kad Terija pieskata bērnus, Tims cenšas apiet visus noteikumus.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora un Zābaciņš pieskata puķītes Zilo Atsperīgo, Margriezīti un Mazo Rozīti, lai Isa varētu doties uz karalisku tējas pēcpusdienu. Dora un Zābaciņš palīdz mazajai Andreai atrast burvju lapu, kas ļauj alebrihei saņemt maģiskās spējas.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Vēl jautrāk kopā ar DORU! Pievienojieties mazajai pētniecei un viņas labākajam draugam Zābaciņam brīnišķīgos ceļojumos pa lietusmežu, kur gaida lieliski piedzīvojumi un tikšanās ar jauniem un veciem draugiem.
